reviews.text: All this is is a cash grab. You can find the same help on your own via Google. Waste of $30 and it isn't even clear who you're actually paying or what you're supposed to get. AVOID. I highly recommend using ChatGPT to find your own avenue of divorce. I will likely be filing on my own without legal aid.

These scumbags set me up for $1.90 and asked me if I wanted to continue the service back in 2024, at which time I told them "no" I only need a "one-time charge".  They didnt even get me connected to anyone who could help me.  Their "service" did NOT help me get in touch with ANY legal services, and I was done at that point.  I wasn't upset because I only needed a one-time use of their "service".  Fast forward to 14 Feb 2025, and I see a pending charge for $19.90 on my account.  Sneaky, but not that sneaky.

I call to get in touch with them to find out what is going on, and in typical scammer style, the dude interrupted me and cut me off when I was trying to talk, and then he had the audacity to tell me I disrespected him.  These "people" are scammers.  Do NOT use their "service" unless you like being ripped off and scammed.  I would give them ZERO stars if I could.
This is a scam

2 stars only because the people on the phone speak professionally. The representative, Amos, told me to wait for a phone call from the attorneys. After not receiving one Within the trial, I called to cancel my service and request a refund for the 19.90 that was charged on the eighth day. I was told the attorneys do not call, And I was supposed to go onto their website and fill out a form, And I would not receive a refund. Amos, you owe me $20.
Please stay out my account taking money when this company haven’t sent me anything to my email, said someone will be contacting me but never did.
After their initial 4.99 it's 20 bucks and they only find lawyers who may or may not take your case
Save yourself the frustration. This company sent me nothing at all, and was rude after I canceled the service. Just use Google. You’ll save yourself the trouble of dealing with these scam artists.

UPDATE: I added 1 star to this review because after I called in and made a fuss, the next day I had unexpectedly been refunded the 1.90$ trial fee, and I have not been charged anything beyond that.

Original review:

I paid 1.90$ for a 7 day trial of their service which normally costs 20$ a month. I would have cancelled the "service" after a day, but since it was the weekend, I cancelled it after 3 days.

While looking for legal answers I somehow got transferred to these jokers who said they could help and signed me up. The reality of the matter ended up being that these people will send you an email with a bunch of publicly free material and the names of other companies that also want to sell you stuff. Other than that, if you express that you have questions, then they will send you contact information for a few law offices that you can contact, but who cannot help you, because 411 Legal could not even manage to send me one relevant contact that could even begin to help me. The most help I got from someone that I contacted as directed by 411 legal was a paralegal telling me to call the Bar Association, which I did, and they recommended someone to help.

Keep in mind that these law offices that 411 Legal points you to have no affiliation with 411 Legal. When you sign up with 411 Legal you are not gaining or receiving any special access, discounts, or services.

411 Legal does not provide any service, nor does it provide any access to anything that is not free. Whether it is technically legal or not, 411 Legal is a scam.

411 Legal could very well have been put together by a homeless person who spent the day googling legal resources to give out to new subscribers, then charges people 20$ a month to do a few useless irrelevant google searches for them.

This is a scam company they released our card information to id secure against our authorization! I've contacted them multiple times to cancel and remove our account information and they refuse to do so by saying they don't have the ability to do so! This is ridiculous!
I would leave 0 stars if I could - total scam

This service is a SCAM! I work at a law office in upstate New York and people are continuously being referred to us by this service with different types of cases that we do not even handle. People are giving their money to this service for information they can get for FREE. Please DO NOT USE THIS SERVICE!!!! AGAIN, IT IS A SCAM!!! Stay safe out there.
Don’t Do it. No help at all. Just collecting your money without your permission. Easy to call and cancel tho .

They will provide you with a google search of law offices around you and do not give you any help really at all.

Website has no actual function to cancel the ~20 dollar charge they put on your card after a ~2 dollar initial charge. you have to call to cancel it.

DO NOT USE THEM. They exist only to collect your contact info and make ~20 dollars a month off poor saps who are panicking about a sudden legal issue like I was.

The operators at legal 411 are very helpful in getting you to the right type of law group or lawyer with in a short amount of time.  This save you hour of hit and miss for the right service that you need right away ...

We called and set up a free trial, I provided my card information and explained that I wanted to no longer be charged, they said okay. Additionally, we received the "resources" they provided and contacted a few who said they wouldn't provide the services 411 Legal promised they would.

After just realizing that they have been charging me for 3 months when we haven't logged in or done anything with our account, I called to cancel and get a refund. The representative who I spoke to was rude and told me I "made no sense". He placed me on a 2 second hold to talk to his "supervisor" and came back with a very snippy, short response of refunding me only 2 months. I explained that I wanted all 3 refunded as I already explained previously I didn't want to be charged further. If he wasn't going to refund me, I would dispute the charges with my back, he laughed and said "ok then".

I wouldn't recommend this company for several reasons, the main one is their customer service. But beware that their "services" turned out to be false. You're better off just Googling lawyers or resources yourself.
They get things done

So they explained I’d be able to access info online once logged in That was a LIE!! Then I call them back saying the site wouldn’t allow me to access ANY INFORMATION!! The guys send me info to lawyers WHO CANT HELP MY CASE! So I’m back on google looking for lawyers and lost my money to these scam people!!! SCAM!!SCAM!!! SCAM!!!! SCAM!!!

Kristi is repping her best friend, and my yet to be ex-wife Heather, in our divorce case even though she does not practice Family Law.

She began advising Heather over 1 year ago.  Our Divorce is not complicated. No kids, no property, no alimony.  Married less than 5 years.  But Kristi has not made any progress except to stall and delay.

One thing Kristi has done is inadvertently given me useful information to use against the ex. In this case, her incompetence has helped me, and I thank her for that.  In addition to a conflict of interest, Kristi has zero negotiation skills, and imo has been a complete detriment to the Ex, and her actions and inactions will cost her client significant financial loss.

If her representation of her best friend is an example of her legal expertise, you’d be wise to search for another lawyer.

Kristi has proven to be quite lacking thus far.

I am so thankful for Julian Alwill for taking my case when no one else would! Julian helped me every step of the way - explaining each part of my case and what he would do to represent me. Julian and his team were able to get my case resolved in less than a month. If you need a sign to stand up for yourself at your place of employment, this is it!
Hoping for Good Things
Very pleased with the attention to not just my case, but the attention to detail and general representation. Thank you Rothschild & Alwill 👍
Kristi is genuinely fighting the good fight. She is extremely knowledgeable, straightforward, compassionate, and went above and beyond for me. I am grateful for her service.
Highly intelligent, compassionate lawyers who are truly there when you need them. Would definitely recommend!

They helped me prevail in a very difficult fight with my employer, The State of California. It was a long, difficult process due to a binding arbitration issue. They are friendly, strategic and real fighters for your rights. They know all the ins and outs of CA law, and employment law, in particular.
The economic downturn hurt a lot of families. I was glad to have this firm on my side when my job ended.  Their advice is excellent.
Extremely professional and caring.
Good lawyers. One of them speaks Spanish.
Got very good results as a client. Glad a bilingual attorney was able to help! Would highly recommend.
Never got a call back.
Josh is great

Whenever you think about retaining a criminal defense attorney review their track record first and whether they have successfully defended their clients. In Josh’s case, in the major criminal cases he has defended, he hasn’t defended one client successfully in trial. Instead, what you’ll see is his clients pleading to often unfavorable terms—making the DA’s job that much easier while earning attorney fees.

In 2010 Josh unsuccessfully ran for District Attorney. Following his lost he was subsequently fired from his position as a result of his behavior. This is all public record. Josh still remains in close contact with the same prosecutors who supported him during his election run; some whom he should be opposing in representing you his client.  All of this remains an inherit conflict of interest.

Recommend considering criminal defense attorneys who have a successfully track record of going to bat for the clients.
O'Brien is one of the best attorneys that I've seen in action.  She cares for people!
Josh is a great negotiator and saved me 1000's expect raw cut the bs to the point representations

Lynn & O'Brien Law Firm is results focused. They won't waste your time or money. Accidents happen and in most business, lawsuits are inevitable. Having Joshua & Angelina, along with the rest of their team, in my corner has proven to be cost effective in defense and rewarding in offense. They are straightforward and to the point. I highly recommend Lynn & O'Brien for any litigation or settlements. They have fought tooth and nail to get the results I was looking for. Do yourself a favor and call them. You'll be happy you did.

I really cannot say enough about Ben.  Not only is he a great lawyer, he also helped me survive a very difficult divorce.

Ben understood how complicated my divorce was going to be. He spent the time to think through each move that he suggested. While the process took longer than I had hoped, it all worked out in the end.

Ben also understands what a divorce does to children of all ages and always helped me deal and understand the issues.

While I now know unfortunately that divorces are expensive, Ben always tried to do everything he could to keep the cost down.

Thank you Ben for your professionalism, dedication and compassion.

Absolutely HORRIBLE Attorney.

Do not trust him with your legal matters.

I write this after 14 years of me having a very unique case and fighting the racist justice system in Santa Barbara which was against Arnie tokes and Judge George Eskins. I am very appreciative of Carty. He kept his word my case has been expunged for awhile . Even though my case was a wobbler they decided to give me a felony for an accessory after the fact P.C 32. The reason I write these is to encourage my latino people to look here first as I was fighting criminal and immigration charges. Carty is very professional and will fight for his clients again with everything going on right now and ICE I suggest you look into attaining his practice if needed . THANKS AGAIN I HOPE ALL IS WELL FROM IOWA!
Top criminal defense attorney in Santa Barbara. Mr. Carty is master jedi in court and the office team is outstanding. You will get the best possible outcome.

This is the best lawyer you could hope for, for the kinds of matters that Mr Carty handles. The legal system is not a system necessarily fair and just, so don't stand there and get run over: you need a skilled advocate.  Mr. Carty is the best.  Dont even think twice about any other option.
Damm good lawyer
Very friendly and professional
Mark helped me with a construction defect case, accurately represented me and won the case.
Knowingly assisted my ex boss in producing a document with a fake signature - mine
Excellent attorney. Highly skilled in construction law.
Title services
Excellent representation and very professional.  Experienced attorney you can trust.
Delayed my wage claim for 6 months and did everything to benefit the employer who stole my life savings and wages.

John Richards is one of the most inspiring, hardworking, and determined people I have ever met. He and his staff were so helpful and supportive. They always helped clarify things and made time to help us with paper work.

John Richards is the kindest toughest, most dedicated attorney ever.The office staff is incredible. We settled out of court but Mr. Richards was fiercely ready and had the tenacity and grit to go to trial if needed! John is a life saver! Thank you John
Arguably the most powerful personal injury attorney in the 805 323 213!!! Steve Price CBSnews LA Sf bureau...

My lawyer he has a very big heart calls me brother and he means it I love this man would go above and beyond for me and I'd do the same for him and his self I love this law office thank you John and staff

My wife and I suffered the same story and asked ourselves the same questions as countless others: how many attorneys do we have to go through before finding a fighter, a man with the mettle to win our case? If all you're interested in is mindless negotiations with insurance companies and a lawyer that settles for less, a loss, before even attempting to file a complaint, then John B. Richards is not for you. But if you want a fighter, a man who will hire the best investigators, go for the jugular, strike fear in the opposition as he LITIGATES to YOUR best interests, then Richards is your man. Don’t settle for less. Chose the attorney with the mettle to fight, litigate and win: John B. Richards, Attorney at Law.

Before I found John Richards I had consulted with 3 other personal injury attorneys, all of whom would not take my case.

John took my case and got me a settlement!

John and his staff were professional, friendly and attentive from start to finish.

John is a straight shooter both in words and action.
Also somewhat rare is that he really cares for his clients.

He is sincere, will fight for your rights, honest and dedicated to his job.
He is one of the best attorneys I ever had. I highly recommend John Richards.

John Richards is an excellent attorney, with exceptional knowledge of the law. There is always someone there when you call who can help, weather it's Mr. Richards, or Sugey his assistant. They both are patient, pleasant, and very helpful. Mr. Richards looks out for the best interest of his clients, and cares about his clients. I am grateful for all he has done for me.
Best attorney in Santa Barbara. I Would Recommend to close family and friends.

Mr. Brown is a stellar attorney. I was often fascinated watching him “in the mode”. He was fair, understanding and absolutely professional 100% of the time. I will be highly recommending him to my closest friends and family.

Bradford Brown is an excellent lawyer! I was in a boating accident in 2011 volunteering for an at-risk youth program administered by the Boys and Girls Club of Oxnard. I spent 2 weeks in the hospital after the accident and 4 months on crutches. The boat operators never filed an insurance claim on my behalf after the accident. I interviewed 5+ lawyers in the Santa Barbara area. Bradford was by far the most empathetic compassionate and detail-oriented. He spent the next 3 years guiding and counseling me through this long, painful and complicated process of suing one of the world's largest insurance companies as the medical bills piled up. I would highly recommend Bradford for those in a similar situation.

The Law Office of Esquire Bradford Brown  and his office where all very personal ,,honest and kind. Everything  explained to me so I could understand. Experience with Esquire Bradford Brown was professional and more than I could ask for.
Worst attorney I met. DON'T TRUST HIM! He'll turn on you like a back stabber. Never hire a local attorney this guy is a dump truck
reviews.ownerResponse: I am truly sorry that I was unable to take on your case because of a conflict of interest.  Lawyers are ethically bound to not take and/or keep a case where a conflict of interest either exists or is discovered.  I wish you the very best and hope you are successful in finding another attorney to represent you.

reviews.text: Bradford Brown assisted me with  getting my car expenses and medical bills paid following a motor vehicle accident. I was amazed that his office was able to cut through the red tape and get my bills covered, including his expenses and fees! If I hadn't gone to Mr. Brown's office, I am sure I would be stuck paying for all the expenses myself, without help from the faulty party's insurer. Thank you very kindly, Mr. Brown, for all your courteous assistance and careful consideration on my behalf. I wholeheartedly recommend this office to others.
Would not recommend

My attorney of 20+ years retired a few years ago and I was concerned I would not be able to find someone as wonderfully skilled and thorough as my previous lawyer. I was wrong. Mr. Black and Ms. Talbot both stepped up and handled my legal matters like I’d worked with them for years.  The process was efficient, their advice was thorough, and their communication was easy to understand. Also, both were consummate professionals from start to finish. I highly recommend them both.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the glowing recommendation, Craig! We are deeply honored that you shared your experience with us and left such a wonderful review. Please, don’t hesitate to contact us if you need our services again!

reviews.text: Erik Black has represented our company's business (construction) for nearly 20 years and has also handled my family's trust and other personal matters. I have found him to be very efficient, knowledgeable and effective in every regard. He has also shown consideration in his billing practices and advisement of what "battles are worth fighting".
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sincerely grateful for your review. Thank you for taking the time out of your day to share your positive experience with us!

reviews.text: I'm surprised to see the other two reviews. We had a very good experience working with Mr. Black. He was professional, hard working, and kind in all of our interactions, and we would certainly work with him again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Sam! I appreciate you taking the time to leave us a positive review.

reviews.text: I was involved in an auto accident after several months of being gaslighted by the responsible parties insurance company I was unsuccessful, unable to settle my case on my own. Jeffrey Young   had been recommended I reached out and explained my case. Jeffrey was very informative, patient, and professional. I would STRONGLY recommend him to anyone needing his particular services. Mr. Young was not only professional and skilled, but responsive and efficient. His skills were remarkable. He worked efficiently and effectively, I can only recommend Jeffrey Young as he is an outstanding attorney who is personable and will work hard to obtain the very best outcome for his client. I’m glad I had Jeffrey Young representing me.

A couple of years ago I was at a dealership in Santa Barbara to pick up a new car that I had purchased.  The dealership has some outside steps that lead up to the showroom.  I tripped on a step, fell down, broke my shoulder in three places and severely injured my breast.  When the dealership downplayed my injuries and blamed me, I hired Jeffrey Young to represent me. We later found out that the steps were not up to code and other patrons had fallen and hurt themselves in the same location.  The dealership had never corrected the problem.  Jeff filed a lawsuit and settled my case in mediation to my complete satisfaction. Throughout the case, he cared for my welfare and recovery, was compassionate and kept me abreast of everything that was going on.  Jeff is a great lawyer. I highly recommend him.

I had a bike accident in December 2020. I had severe damage to my front teeth and no clue how to how find the driver that caused it, she didn't give me any information. Fortunately, there was a video camera at the site that recorded the accident. Plus, my friend posted about it on SNS. Finally I found the driver, which took a month. However, she denied fault. It was not easy to negotiate. Jeff asked me to write everything about the accident details and my feelings. My dentist also helped us with paperwork. Jeff encouraged me a lot during that time and he negotiated with her insurance company. Finally we won and got more than I expected. I really thank Jeff's hard work and compassion. I am from Japan and It was very hard for me having an accident like this abroad as a second language speaker. Jeff was always patient with me. He is very friendly and cares for his clients very much, he always responds quick by phone or text. Very reliable attorney. Thank you Jeff!

Attorney Jeff Young represented my partner in a case that was tried ealry 2022. I have nothing but great things to say about Attorney Jeff Young. From start to finish, which was over a 12 month period, Mr Young has displayed impeccable standards on every level.
He is a hard working, extremely professional, very well organized, methodical and reliable attorney. Precision, attention to details, leaving no stone unturned, going after every loose ends and eventually finding his way to winning the case for my partner.
Going through a lawsuit can be nerve wracking and extremely taxing. It’s a slow moving process that will take over the biggest part of your life. Therefore it is crucial to choose an attorney that will not only be available, but also understanding and supportive, because it can be an emotional roller coaster. In that sense, Mr Young has not disappointed either.
I highly recommend hiring Attorney Jeff Young.

Mr. Young represented me in a very difficult case of defamation. I was initially very nervous and scared to go forward with a lawsuit as I had never been involved in one before. However, Mr. Young not only put my nerves at ease during the process, but he restored my faith in the judicial system. Mr. Young is not only hard working, reliable, consistent, and steadfast in his duties as a lawyer, but he is also one of the most ethical and truly big-hearted people I know. He has dedicated his life to seeking justice in the world. Observing him in his practice was nothing shy of inspiring and masterful. He made a very difficult time in my life possible with his compassion for my case and his wisdom and knowledge of the law. I would recommend Jeff Young as a lawyer a million times over.
Thank you for your collaborative work with programs, Annie. Always a pleasure working with you. Much appreciated.
Details forthcoming
Simply the best!! Great personalized representation of client and professional conduct. Go Anne!
Bertram Vancurler

Annie Hayes has helped me so much with my cases, working hard and actually caring for my well being and remaining in touch with me though out the process. I couldn’t have been appointed a better layer and I’m so thankful for her and her services. 10/10 recommend!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much! It has been a joy working with you!

reviews.text:
First class to Annie Hayes, it was an almost impossible dui battle but she got me great results and fought through every step of the way! Kept me updated, flexible,  friendly, the total package. Highly recommend if in need of a great lawyer.

Thanks again Annie! :)
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Romero, it was a joy to work with you!  So happy with the results we achieved.

reviews.text: She’s incredible and helped me through a very difficult time and situation!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Mia! So glad we were able to help!

reviews.text: Doug & Annie are absolutely incredible. You can tell from the moment you meet them that they truly care about each of their clients. They are trustworthy, honest, and reliable. I could not recommend them more!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Cierra!

reviews.text: As a business owner, it is very important to have a legal team that are responsive, knowledgeable and compassionate. Annie Hayes has been all of those things and so much more. I will continue to seek her legal advice as future issues arise.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Ivie, thank you for the recommendation and continued support!  We value you and your business!

reviews.text: Anne Hayes is professional, hard-working, and dedicated to her clients! I highly recommend her.
reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate your support, Ms. Weber!  Thank you for the review.
Thank you for the support, Ms. Smith!

reviews.text: Anne Hayes is incredibly kind and dedicated to her work. She is an exceptional lawyer and a wonderful person. She is a gem.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Love, thank you!

reviews.text: Anne Hayes is an amazing attorney. She worked tirelessly with my family over the seven month legal process. She took the time to really understand our unique situation as well as answer the numerous questions we had. Anne Hayes worked diligently and brought my family members home.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Ryan!

reviews.text:
I hired Jeff for a criminal Defense case. He was highly disorganized, failed to provide me with all the evidence for my case, failed To be able to show me the evidence after a months long awaited meeting due to his laptop being “too old” & had failed to download any of the evidence prior to the meeting. I fired Jeff after he was unable
to produce any positive results and he started bullying me into taking felonies and moving the case to pre-trial before I had received the evidence or seen it, and hired Ridley Defense who has been able to get my case DISMISSED and my record will be sealed! The experiences between the two were night and day. Ridley actually spent 3 hours showing me all the evidence in a beautiful office, treated me with respect the entire time and was timely with his email and text response. His facility and tech knowledge was what I would expect from a paid attorney. You may as well hire the free Public Defender if you’re considering hiring Jeff.

Great lawyer

Known in town

Simple and to the point
As a non criminal defense attorney, I refer my criminal matters to Jeff.  He is personable and smart.  As a former high level public defender, he knows the law and the judges.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you David.

reviews.text: Easy to find and parking.

I really hope, that no other family has to go through what we have gone through in 2023 & 2024!!  Truly !

This firm and these lawyers, are careless, reckless, and could cost you and your family A Lot of money.  With their 'work' and the subsequent need to un-do their work.  They do not keep their clients or beneficiary's needs, in focus, or top-of-mind.  BEWARE
I'll be seeing you soon
Great people

This woman is also a family law facilitator trying to give clients her business card after giving wrong information.  In my situation she gave me terrible advice and made me feel like I was screwed with child support.  If I would have taken her advice my child support would have doubled, which she hoped for so I would go for an appeal with her business.  Money hungry lawyer using her position as a free family law facilitator for the county to manipulate uneducated individuals in hopes to make more $$.

Probably fine if you want to spend $4000+ for a boilerplate document, plus several thousand more for any changes you want to discuss or incorporate. Don’t expect a creative approach to tax efficient estate planning, they provide a ‘one size fits all’ document irrespective of your wealth categories. Perhaps clients with 8 figure estates receive better service.

We hired Mullen & Henzell to help us obtain conservatorship of our severely disabled daughter.  We were quoted a price of roughly $4,000 "maybe a little more with court fees".  We received a bill for $8,902.69  Their communication was poor and there were aspects of the case that they had little or no knowledge of.
Great people

The law offices here are quite helpful with setting up my will and helped me along the steps of being able to work though legal matters. It's just a bit hard to get a hold of who you need to cause they are always super busy.

A complicated and time sensitive project was accomplished accurately, timely and effectively. A great team.
Scott N. Wilson, CPA

Louis is very helpful and passionate about what he does. He really knows the law through and through. He is working with me on a case to help me get my dog back from some people who adopted him from the Santa Barbara Country animal shelter, who’s employees ignored me when I told them many times that I was cutting my vacation short, and taking a last minute flight back to Santa Barbara to pick him up. The case is still open but it’s looking very promising. This guy doesn’t back down!
hello,I  just want to say Tracey was really great. She was very helpful every step of the way.
No free consultations.

I cannot say enough about the incredible support and assistance I received from Charles "Chip" Oxton. From the moment I reached out to him, he exhibited exceptional expertise, professionalism, and compassion in handling my custody. He ensured that my child's well-being was at the forefront of all our proceedings.

I believe that what sets Chip apart is not just his exceptional legal skills but his remarkable qualities as a human being. He genuinely cares about his clients, which really mattered to me during an emotionally draining time. He was always honest and direct, even when it meant having difficult conversations.

In addition to Chip, I had very nice interactions with other lawyers and assistants at his office. Feeling safe about being at a lawyer's office is reassuring in challenging times.

In summary, if you find yourself in need of an attorney who has great legal skills but who is also an amazing person, I strongly recommend Chip! He had an immense impact on my life during one of the most challenging times I've ever faced.

When my husband passed away it was a shock. A friend realized that I was going to need a lawyer. I called Charles office in a panic and spoke with Beth. Without hesitation Charles was on the phone with me and after only 10 minutes he knew exactly what to do. He showed up for me! For 3 years, he and the team were my voice. It was a complicated, frustrating fight to the finish. Through the entirety of the pandemic, with court cases being pushed and dealing with multiple lawyers on the other side, Charles and team kept me calm, walked me through everything step by step. They made sure to answer every question, take every meeting and most importantly heard every word I said. Even when I was completely freaking out. Charles was my muscle.

Professional, trustworthy, knowledgeable about the law. Charles and team are also compassionate, but tough when it comes to fighting for what is right.

During the toughest time in my entire life, Charles and team were there for me. I could not have gotten through this without them.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Nelly,
Thank you so very much! It was a privilege to represent you.
- Chip and staff

reviews.text:
I have had the good fortune of knowing Mr. Oxton for 26+ years. In that time, he has represented me on a few occasions as legal counsel in my child support/custody issues. His knowledge of family law is solid, but more importantly, he cared about me restoring my relationship with my children. Over the years, we have kept in close contact and our relationship has continued to evolve, from client, to that of a father figure. He has shown me how to be a better father and man just by seeing how he interacts with his children and loved one's. If it were not for my relationship with him, I would not have the relationship that I have with my children today. My relationship with Mr. Oxton inspired me to start a 501 (3) (c) non-profit program that mentor's youth in our local community with life, communication and financial literacy skills.
I am thankful that I met him all those years ago. He continues to advise me on legal issues today with my businesses, and as good as he is as an attorney, he's an even better man
I highly recommend Mr. Oxton (Chip)!

“Chip“ is an honest attorney who has represented me well. He gives you straight answers and is very fair in assessing your case. I cannot recommend Chip highly enough! I hired Chip based on the recommendation of another attorney and have never regretted using his services.

Charles M. Oxton - Thelma Corsa
Santa Barbara - OxtonStaabGans

Charles Oxton and Thelma Corsa  helped me through my Dissolution and were a great team.
I always felt they were absolutely in my corner and were committed to the best outcome for me.  They each supported me according to their particular focus and expertise, and I can recommend them both very highly.

Chip Oxton gave me faith in the legal profession again.  I had a naïve perspective on what the judicial system looked liked in real life.  It wasn't until I was in the trenches of "family law" that I witnessed its dark side.  I cannot express the value of having a consummate professional such as Chip Oxton in your corner to navigate the ins and outs of the legal system.  As a child, I was raised to understand and appreciate the difference between the letter of the law versus the spirit of the law.  It is entirely refreshing to have legal representation that understands their value and embraces it from a place of integrity and professional excellence.

If it had not been for the counsel of Chip Oxton and Eric Gans, my life and the life of my family would look gravely different today.  Both gentlemen have worked tirelessly on my behalf since 2012 to help me preserve my rights as a parent and realize my goal of raising a family from a place of love and stability.

During the time they defended me, and indirectly my family, I had the privilege to observe a consummate professional, business owner, one of the most excellent attorneys in their profession and a proud and doting father and family man.  I work in an industry with high revenues and oftentimes egos that match or exceed it; in it, I have learned what is "bluster" and what is "real".  Integrity, excellence and determination are the words that come to mind when I think of Chip and Eric.

I have only the utmost respect for Chip and Eric as legal professionals, but most importantly, as human beings.  I heartily give my recommendation of their legal services and am beyond grateful to have them in my "corner".

There are no words to say how Charles excels in every aspect as a lawyer. reviews.text: I spoke to the intake person at Harris and they took my case. I signed the papers and everything. Harris personal injury really helped me out! My car got totaled in March 2024 & I got a concussion, headaches, dizziness & other related post-accident symptoms. The underinsured driver’s insurance offered me $250 for my injuries (which felt like a slap in the face!) so my grandpa suggested I get a lawyer. The team really helped me out by getting all my doctor’s appointments on attorney lean so I didn’t have to pay until the case was settled. We ended up settling for $30,000, which covered my health visits, payment to Harris personal injury, and some for me. Much better than $250!

This was my first time working with a lawyer so I was nervous, of course. It’s definitely worth the time & energy if the at-fault driver is underinsured. And their team was genuinely responsive & guided me through the process. A HUGE shoutout to Dulce Vargas, who was really great at reminding me to send over documents & coordinate care. Excellent customer service. Justin Hall also helped get the settlement pushed through. Great attorneys!! Very thankful to their team & happy to recommend them :)

From start to finish, there were several attorneys that I worked with who were all excellent including Jared Salter, Justin Hall and support staff Jeff Waldram, Dulce Vargas, and Madison Simoes. reviews.text: This company has hosted my website for more than ten years, and I have been extremely pleased with the services they have provided. I receive solicitations for web services regularly, sometimes multiple times a day, and Matt is very familiar with most of them. Diana Lytel expertly navigated me through the legal system when I had trouble. Despite my nervousness of the situation Diana was always professional and kept me calm throughout my case. If I ever have legal trouble in the Ventura/Oxnard/Santa Barbara area I will be using her again. If you have legal trouble do your self a favor and retain Diana, you will not regret it.

Roger Lytel was kind, charming, and filled me with confidence… until I paid him my money. Having a 0.08 alcohol content when arrested, he told me that have decent chance of getting a Dry Reckless. After I signed his contract suddenly my “good evidence” turned into “bad evidence.” He would get upset every time I’d even mention the possibility of getting a dry reckless, as if I was not allowed to ask. What else? He never told me that I can completely avoid a DUI license suspension as long as I install an Ignition Interlock Device (IID). In fact, when I told him that I received ads in the mail for the IID he explicitly said that they are all trash and I should throw them away (I later found out about the IID laws through his coworker, Carlos).At one point my mother called him crying and asked if there is any solution to avoiding a DUI license suspension since I just graduated college and genuinely need my license; Roger told her that I will indeed have my license suspended and that she is overacting because I am not going to jail, and then he hung upon her. I am NOT making this up.  How does a lawyer who claims to be the best not know about a well-known IID law? He also told me that my license was going to be suspended for 6 months as a result of a wet reckless, it was suspended for 4 months (which I avoided with the IID). And, how can somebody who is supposed to represent you be so rude and hang up the phone on your crying mother? Thousands of dollars and Roger did not even give me his cellphone number—I asked, he refused. As previously mentioned, all of this is the genuine truth! Do yourself a favor and do not give your hard-earned money to this so-called good lawyer. You are better off with a public defender. Heck, you are even better off defending yourself. Disclaimer: I am not giving him a bad review because he failed to get me a dry reckless, I am writing it because of his lies, incompetence, and negligence.

Words can’t describe how thankful I am that I decided to go with Carolyn Layfield to handle my workmans comp issues. She made my nightmare of a situation so much easier to bear. Carolyn always made herself available to answer questions and ensure that I understood what was happening and what my options were in any situation. She made sure I got moved to better doctors who actually wanted to help me (and they did). Carolyn always fought for me and made sure my rights weren’t being violated. She also wouldn’t beat around the bush when the insurance company would do something shitty, however she also explained how it wasn’t illegal for them to do what they were doing and why. This is so important because the system is built to take advantage of the injured party’s ignorance and lack of will to fight through all the BS.
Being in the workmen’s comp system is an absolute nightmare and I had only wished I had sought legal counsel sooner! If you are reading this and are wondering if you need to get legal counsel, the answer is YES! Just call and meet with Carolyn, and she will give you a lot of good advice and you can count on her genuinely putting her heart in her work and tirelessly fighting for you, just as she did for me.

Words cannot adequately express how grateful I am to Daniel K. Simon, Carolyn Layfield, and their entire staff.  Originally, I injured my lower back lifting a bag of money.  My employer refused to accommodate my injury.  I became stressed so bad that I couldn’t explain what had happened to me.  Somehow, Carolyn understood what I was saying and explained my legal position so I could understand it.  “Cumulative Trauma Injury.”  Carolyn made sure that I got the best Medical and Psychiatric care.  She prepared me for both the Medical and Psychiatric Qualified Medical Examinations, as well as, my Deposition.  Workers’ Compensation was fighting pretty hard to deny my benefits, but they were “NO MATCH” for Carolyn Layfield.  Carolyn made sure I have a future.  I worked as an American Bar Association Accredited Paralegal for over 30 years prior to becoming a Delivery Driver during the pandemic.  I know what constitutes a “Great Attorney.”  Carolyn is an “Exceptional Attorney.”  I am fortunate that she represented me, and I would not hesitate to have her represent me in the future.

I would like to reiterate that it did not cost me a dime for their initial consultations which educated and encouraged me to do whats right for the claim that I had.

Words can't express the weight and frustration that was lifted off my shoulders after their office took my case. Furthermore, the settlement reached was nothing short of a miracle and was ONLY reached due to the fact that Daniel K. Simon is one of the best lawyers in California.

I have always thought that insurance companies are always trying to make things right and do whatever is best for the victim but that is just simply not true. You must have representation that is on YOUR SIDE and fight for YOU!

Going to Daniel K. Simon's office was one of the best decisions of my life and I highly encourage anyone in southern California to have him represent you in order to receive the thousands of dollars that you are entitled to.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Elvis, it was a pleasure representing you! We are overwhelmed and humbled by your kind words of review! We would be honored to be asked to assist you or anyone you know with any legal matter. And yes,
always with a free consultation! Be happy; be healthy! And please stay in touch! Warmly, Daniel

reviews.text:
Leposavic law firm was the best decision I made when looking for someone to assist me in a legal case. This was my first time ever seeking legal advice. Jennifer is incredible! She's professional, knowledgeable and efficient. I was very nervous about the process and had so many questions. She listened to me, answered all my questions and walked me through the process.
She is the most organized person I have ever met! She dedicated hours and hours of time jennifer always went the extra mile kept me informed via email or face to face.  Jennifer never let me down she was compassionate, strong and dedicated every step of the way. I'm so thankful I found her.

I had an exceptional experience with Malgorzata at Hackett Law. Her unwavering support and efficiency made the entire process seamless. I highly recommend her to anyone navigating through bankruptcy; she's incredibly helpful and ensures you feel at ease every step of the way. Thank you again!
Used Mal for a bk ch 7. Made everything super easy and simple. Will be referring people ASAP!

Quintessential professional. Brilliant intellect and  discernment. Provided powerful and helpful, effective guidance through a very difficult time with the most successful outcome imaginable achieved.
A+++ highly recommend!

Robert and Matt are terrific lawyers and quality men of integrity and character.  I have collaborated with them several times over the years and have enjoyed great success and found them to be honest, skilled and communicative.  They have created amazing results for clients we've referred and I would highly recommend them and their firm.

Bob and Wendy I can't say enough of your professionalism, guidance, and expertise of all your work. Thank you so much for your attention to detail in our case. I recommend your office to anyone that would require such services. There is nobody out there that could achieve the quality of work and compassion that you showed me and my family. We were not just clients to your office, you made us feel like family. Every step of the way you kept us informed and were always available if needed. You made sure that we knew that we were important to your office, and for that we are forever grateful.

Bob was handled our case for my daughter who was injured in a car accident.  We were basically satisfied with the work, however based on how Bob explained his fee structure to us, we felt that we were lied to and cheated.  We tried to have an honest discussion  with Bob-it didn't go very well.  It is our opinion that we caught Bob in a lie when he told us his assistant Wendy was in the conference room when he explained the fee structure percentage.  My family is positive Wendy was not there- so obviously why Wendy would not confirm to us that she was present.  We are hopeful that Bob will have the professional integrity and make this right.

Bob has been great to work with. He has helped on a few small legal matters, and always approached each situation with compassion, patience and with a wealth of knowledge to find a thoughtful and agreeable solution to the situation. I would highly recommend his guidance and support.

SAVE YOUR TIME AND ENERGY, GO SOMEWHERE ELSE!!!! They accepted my case, were incredibly unhelpful and did nothing for months before sending me an email stating they decided they aren't going to take the case and recommend I try a firm in another state with zero explanation as to why I should do that.

If my case wasn't something they could work, they could have told me that months prior and given me a chance to work with someone else. Now I have to start at square one with a case that's months behind. A little communication about what's happening would have been nice. An explanation as to why they wasted so much of my time would have been even better. They did neither.

Shame on this firm and their incredibly poor customer service. I'd give zero stars if that were an option.

Mr. Patterson is a brilliant lawyer.  He has helped me several times on different matters.  He always had a prompt resolution and was very informative and helpful.  He is a very nice and gregarious man.

My husband and I are extremely grateful to Patterson Law for their expertise and integrity in helping us through our auto accident claim process. We could not have navigated all the complexities of the claims with the insurance companies and Medicare without Patterson Law’s patient and expert assistance every step of the way!  Robert Patterson often made personal calls to us, answering our questions and updating us on the progress of our claim. His office manager was very accommodating with her friendly calls and e-mails to obtain accurate information from us to aid in the completion of our case. We highly recommend Patterson Law to anyone seeking superior legal advice delivered with graciousness and professionalism.  This is truly a five-star office!

I am truly grateful that I was referred to Bob Patterson when I found myself dealing with an unexpected legal situation. Bob wasted no time and worked swiftly to ensure everything was taken care of on my behalf. His experience and wealth of knowledge reassured me and made a stressful situation much less stressful. I would work with Bob again in a heartbeat.

I do not have enough words to express all the positive things about Bob and his team. When we were in the unfortunate need of counsel, Bob was attentive, thorough, and caring. He had an exemplary way of communicating in a way so that we understood the process from start to finish, while demonstrating professionalism and kindness at the same time. Highly recommend.

My mother-in-law was injured while in a Santa Barbara nursing home due to neglect. She died soon after. Bob Patterson shepherded my wife and me through the trauma and legal rigamarole to an eventual settlement. We can't recommend Bob highly enough.

I can't say enough positive things about Bob Patterson and his team. Bob is a highly skilled and effective lawyer who works hard and achieves excellent results for his clients.  I never imagined I would find myself involved in a lawsuit and I had no idea how to choose an attorney I could trust. I am so grateful I chose Bob. I can't imagine having gone through this process without him. He was my rock! He made sure all my questions were answered (of which I had a lot throughout the process), always kept me updated on the case, checked in with me to make sure I was doing okay, explained everything to me in a very easy to understand way. He was easy to reach and always available, and worked around my schedule when we needed to schedule things. He was very accommodating in every respect. His experience, expertise and knowledge as a trial lawyer is immense and I believe it is because of these attributes that the outcome of my case was so favorable. The personalized and professional care that Bob and his team gave my case was phenomenal. I am forever grateful and would choose Patterson Law again in a heartbeat. Highly recommended.

I am so happy to have been referred to Bob when I was dealing with an injury imposed by another person last year. From our initial communication through to the finalization of the settlement, Bob and his staff were very empathetic to my situation. I felt that they genuinely cared about me and the struggles I was facing. Both Bob and his legal assistant, Wendy, were proactive in reaching out to me and attending to my case. I felt that they anticipated the questions I might have and made sure I was always updated about the status of my matter. I am satisfied with the outcome and would absolutely work with this team again if ever I had a need. Thank you Bob and Wendy for your work over the last year!

Absolute professional and a stout defender of his clients. After being hit by a red light runner, Bob didn’t let the insurance companies dodge their responsibility and ensured all my bills were covered. Bob walked me through all of my options, recommended the best doctors to ensure full recovery from my injuries, and communicated throughout the entire process. I highly recommend Bob Patterson if you are ever in the unfortunate situation of needing an attorney.

Bob took in my case and worked hard to find it a fair ending. He listened to my concerns and was readily available. His assistant Wendy was always available and had a steady hold on what was going on with the case.

Robert Patterson successfully managed a complicated multi-party, multiple-issue adversarial litigation involving real estate rental judgments, mold counter claims, and insurance company claims related thereto. Roberts Asset Management would recommend he be considered as either a plaintiff or defense counsel in connection with Santa Barbara County legal disputes.

I have engage the services of Robert Patterson and his staff twice .  In both cases he was successful and more importantly he was a human . His ability to communicate  the complexity of the legal world to the client is a rare gift . The passion that Bob and his assistant Wendy demonstrate in Championing  your case makes them seem more of your friends  and  protectors then  attorneys that you’ve engaged . I cannot recommend them strongly enough !

In 2007 I fell and broke my right ankle because of a dangerous situation at a retirement community.  After the accident, I was treated badly by the people that owned the property.  The ignored me.  They made me feel like I didn’t matter and I felt they were discriminating against me.  They wouldn’t listen when I told them someone else might get hurt unless they fix the problem.
A law office highly recommended Mr. Robert Paterson as a good lawyer who would help me.  He met with me, he explained my rights to me, and he made me feel very comfortable.  I was badly injured, and I had to have two surgeries and stay in the hospital.  I was in pain when I met Mr. Patterson and I was worried about my future.  He told me about my rights against the company that caused my injuries and he explained how I could recover money for my medical expenses, all the work I missed and everything that happened to me.  Mr. Patterson accepted my case and he quickly got to work talking to witnesses and getting records and information for my case.
Mr. Patterson was very professional and efficient and he won my case.  We recovered money and I was very happy with how it ended.
Most of all I was happy to have someone who believed in me and took care of me.  I had confidence in Mr. Patterson.  He seemed very committed to my case and best interests.  He never gave up until we won the case.  Mr. Patterson was friendly and supportive the whole time.
I’m so grateful to him for all he did for me.
Gladys Munoz

Bob deserves my highest praise. While assisting with my case he came with a no nonsense honest opinion. Along with his professionalism he was very caring and concerned about my own personal well being. I would reccomend anyone who is in need of a personally injury lawyer, Bob is simply one of the best.

I had a problem concerning my work and did not know where to turn.  Robert Patterson listened to my problem, and helped me through the process.  He did help me achieve a good result and I can say that it
would not have happened if I had tried to figure out the complicated
system by myself.  I had been referred to him by someone that I trusted.
So, that tells me that he has a great reputation and following.
Worked for me!

Bob Patterson deserves high praise as an attorney. He handled my personal injury case with the utmost professionalism, high intelligence, genuine caring about my condition, and an attention to details that brought about a better than expected result. I strongly recommend Bob Patterson should you need a personal injury attorney!

Bob is a very compassionate and caring Attorney and he gets the job done. I had a wonderful experience working beside him. Although legal issues can get a bit messy, as I look back I am left with a smile on my face because of the immense support, patience and professionalism Bob provided. Bob changed my life and I can't thank him enough for what he has done for me. From the bottom of my heart, thank you!

I would highly recommend this attorney for your personal injury case.

My case took close to 2 years to complete and he stuck to it through the entire time and made me feel good about what was being done.  Not only that but he made sure that I was OK on a personal level that made it a joy to work with him.

When we finally got to the table to negotiate the settlement, he was very knowledgeable of the process and I felt we did very well and I did not feel at all like we could have done better.

A negligent neighbor caused  a fire that burned my place of business almost to the ground. Mr Patterson was highly recommended to me and I was not disappointed. He pursued my suit diligently and efficiently and successfully.
Needed some advice and they responded instantly and Mr Beahm himself emailed right away and answered all of my questions. Very friendly and helpful!

If you are in a jam and need some assistance, Jason Beahm is your man. Thoughtful, honest, meticulous and a sagacious lawyer - he will steer you in the right direction. He's one of the great ones folks.

Rude, and extremely pushy. Charged me over 11k just to file paperwork (because of the time constraint), and one court appearance via Zoom (5 minutes). Tried to strong hold my inheritance check, just to be told by his own bank that he couldn't legally deposit My Check into his private account.  Though there's legal procedure. I paid him the next day.
Sad because I was referred by an old friend.
Never use this rude, pushy attorney. Doesn't even deserve a star
We had an excellent experience with this team and would highly recommend them for their estate planning expertise.
Great attorney

Joshua Newstat is an outstanding criminal attorney. Mr. Newstat was able to give thoughtful, thorough, and, most importantly, useful practical legal advice regarding a wide variety of criminal legal issues. He always returned my calls promptly and was clear and understandable in his responses.  I felt confident he would be able to resolve my legal problems.
Excellent service. Kristine takes the time to not only solve the problem but explain to you the details of how and why. Highly recommended!
Handled my matter effectively, answered all my questions, and his whole office was always very professional and responsive. Hope you never need him, but highly recommended if you do.
Thank you for your collaborative work with programs. Much appreciated.

I was referred to the Law Offices of William Makler by a friend and feel that I would be doing a disservice by not referring him to others.
Right away, Bill helped set my mind at ease about my case and I knew I was in good hands. He assisted me and remained in contact every step of the way, until my case was resolved. Most importantly, he helped achieve the best possible outcome I could have hoped for.
I cannot fail to mention the extremely helpful, friendly staff that work with Bill. They always answered my phone calls and were willing to assist with any questions or concerns I had.
I am so glad that I went with Bill as my lawyer and cannot recommend him and his team highly enough.

Bill and his staff perform excellent work. If you ever find yourself facing the unfortunate reality of requiring a criminal defense attorney, don't look any further.

I found myself in a situation earlier this year that necessitated hiring legal counsel. After having been arrested for a violent felony (which was neither truly felonious or particularly violent, but was being perceived as such), I had no choice but to call for help. And I had no idea where to look.

After several free consultations with various criminal defense attorneys in the Santa Barbara area, I became discouraged by their lack of transparency in not only their fee structure, but also their methodology in "consulting". Their consultations were essentially a sales pitch comprised of scare tactics to persuade prospective clients into retaining their services for tens of thousands of dollars. One local firm even indicated I would be remanded into custody at my first court date if I *don't* hire them. Bullshit. Some of these people are bigger criminals than the criminals they defend.

I should've just started by calling Bill Makler. He was quick to respond, he was extremely open and transparent about his fee structure, and took the time to explain what I should expect depending on variable outcomes and contingencies. In other words: no surprises, no games, no bullshit. The same cannot be said for many of his local competitors in SB.

Bill Makler and his team get their work done. If you end up needing to retain counsel, hire Bill - ask the pertinent questions, take his advice, and let him do the work. If you're looking to be coddled during your time being put through the wringer, hire a therapist. If you want a competent and intelligent lawyer that will get you the best possible outcome of your criminal case, call Mr. Makler.

What was the outcome of my "violent felony" arrest just a few short months ago?

As of the date of this writing, the case is completely dismissed.
Took care of everything quickly and painlessly. Would recommend 10/10.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 10 stars is what he deserves
William Makler is an amazing attorney and a genuinely kind person. He took the time to help me with his knowledge and advice out of pure kindness, even though he didn’t know me. I’m truly grateful — you don’t meet people like that often. Highly recommend!

We were very impressed with the professionalism and dedication  of Bill Makler. His deep knowledge of and experience with the workings of the legal system allowed him to quickly and accurately understand the challenges we faced and to offer us sound and much needed guidance to resolve our problem in the most cost effective and safest method. I hope not to require his services in the future, but if I have a problem he will be the first I will call and trust to handle it effectively and honestly.

Mr. Makler and his team — Maureen, Maria, and Rachel — are hands down the best legal team in Santa Barbara. They’re diligent and work tirelessly to get you the best possible outcome. Maureen, Maria, and Rachel are always willing to answer questions, explain each step, and keep you calm and informed throughout the process. Mr. Makler goes above and beyond to ensure his clients receive the best possible deal, and takes the time to communicate with compassion and understanding. Thank you! — AA
The most fantastic lawyer. I couldn't be more satisfied with his professionalism and knowledge and care.

I highly recommend Bill Makler to anyone in need of legal assistance, particularly veterans. Bill is a true expert in working with Veterans Court and has extensive experience handling legal issues specific to veterans. He works out of Santa Barbara County, and from the start, he was the only attorney who took the time to speak with me directly. Bill is professional, compassionate, and transparent, always making sure I understood my options and what to expect.

His rates were fair, and he achieved an outstanding result by getting my case dismissed. On top of that, his team is excellent – they are incredibly responsive, typically getting back to me either the same day or the following business day. I’m beyond grateful for Bill’s expertise and the support from his staff. For any veteran seeking legal help in Santa Barbara County, I strongly recommend reaching out to Bill Makler!
Bill was clear and to the point and helped navigate the dmv process with ease.

Great representation with a positive outcome!  Communication was easy and very straight forward.
Thank you!

I am so thankful I decided to have Mr. Makler represent me in my criminal and then civil case. He and his legal team put experience and skill to work for me and after getting my charges lowered, he ultimately succeeded in having my case completely thrown out with all charges dropped. Not only did I get the desired end result, but Mr. Makler and his team were patient, and supportive throughout the process. Mr. Makler saw that the charges against me were ridiculous and that I was not guilty of any infraction. He compiled and presented the evidence including security camera footage and once the facts were clearly seen, the case was dropped. Thank you Mr. Makler for fighting for me and ensuring the true facts were visible to the justice system.
William and his team are were very helpful. I took his immediate recommendation and the problems went away. 10/10 recommended fast and helpful
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Alfredo. It was our pleasure to serve you. All the best!

reviews.text: Extremely dedicated team, great lines of communication, always quick to respond to all my questions; very professional and well worth the rate. Highly recommend.
William took care of me with professionalism and efficiency. I highly recommend if you're in need of help! Thank you guys!

I retained Mr. Makler to assist when my son was inappropriately charged with a violation.  He is extremely knowledgeable and a very good advocate for his clients.   We were kept up to date throughout the matter, and always received answers to any questions quickly.  All charges were dismissed.

In the beginning of my journey of fighting this criminal charge, I was stuck with a public defender who, for the lack of a better word, was useless. After him, I got transferred to a different public defender who was very lackluster and dismissive. That is when I made the decision to search for a better alternative. Bill came highly praised and after our first conversation he gave me a few options that would result in my case being dismissed. Those options were never even mentioned by my prior attorneys. I will be forever grateful for what himself, Tony and the rest of their team did for me and my life. The initial deliberation between paying a private attorney (which is, by the way, more affordable than I initially anticipated) or sticking with a public one ended up being worth it in the end. I would do this all over again in a heartbeat, if I had to. Highly recommend their services. They are super attentive, responsive, diligent, professional, and in the upper echelon of their craft.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Max, for taking time to share your comments about our services and your over all experience.  It is, no doubt, useful to those who are trying to find the right firm to defend their criminal matter in Santa Barbara County. We are, of course, very happy that your case was thrown out today...at long last.  Congratulations!  And never hesitate to reach out.  We are for you!

reviews.text: I was fortunate enough to be assisted by Mr. Makler, who was exceptionally helpful and attentive. reviews.text: Straight forward and helpful.

Bill was a godsend after I found myself in a once-in-a-lifetime predicament with serious ramifications. I had never faced such a challenge before, and I was at a loss for how to proceed. While the outcome was not ideal, I have no doubt that Bill did his utmost with the resources at his disposal. Moreover, I felt confident that I was in good hands and that he was an honorable and trustworthy advocate for my case.

I was extremely fortunate to be referred to Bill Makler after an incident occured while traveling in Santa Barbara County.  Through the duration of my case Bill showed a very genuine demeanor, trustworthy character, and always proved to have a tremendous working knowledge of law and past practice.  He also has a great reputation among his colleagues and well established working relationships.  I highly recommend Bill to anyone needing legal services that are within his wheelhouse.

Everyone at the Law Offices of William C Makler was very helpful and professional — and unexpectedly kind and empathetic especially given the nature of our brother’s transgressions — during a very difficult time. I’m so glad we chose them.

Amazing lawyer, has helped me out over years now! The entire team has provided consistent effort, knowledgeability, and professionalism to the highest degree. I very much appreciated all their help and would definitely recommend to others as well!

Bill and all of his staff were extremely helpful throughout the whole process and more importantly were able to fully take care of all my charges, fines, etc. I highly recommended Him especially with cases regarding DUI or similar matters.
Mr. Makler was very helpful throughout the whole process. He guided me every step of the way. I highly recommend Mr. Makler’s services.

Mr. Makler is a superb and exceptional attorney with an extremely knowledgable and caring team. He was willing to walk me through a plan of action in the middle of the night when I called him for the first time after an awfully unfortunate situation. I'm really glad I chose to have him be the representative in my case. Bill and his team always respond promptly. At a time when my whole life got turned upside down, I was desperate for answers. Mr. Makler and his team were extremely patient with me throughout the entire process, even though I'm sure I drove them crazy with a million questions (I know I'd drive myself crazy!). I'm very grateful for that patience and support that I received from Mr. Makler, Maureen and Maria. Maureen and Maria are super awesome and spent a great amount of time explaining things to me and giving me updates. Mr. Makler has many many years of experience being a defender and there is a reason why his name comes up first when you google the best criminal defense lawyers in Santa Barbara. Now I know why firsthand! Mr. Makler and his team truly care for their clients and I vouch for it! From the beginning, Bill said he wasn't going to settle for a quick outcome, but rather the best outcome possible even if it takes work. Saved my life with the best possible outcome. Thank you!

i got into a bit of a mess that i was going to need an attorney to help get me through . it was a lot of stress on me . the charge was pretty serious . i call william makler's office on saturday morning after the friday incident took place , and bill answered his phone , which really impressed me . bill explained his fees and that he would be there all the way . i trusted bill and he came through . bill and his staff are very professional and i highly reccomend them . thanks bill . sincerely , chris joles

Mr. Makler pays attention, listens well, and is easy to understand. He helped us tremendously and quickly and we are now recommending him to everyone! 
Hire him. He's the best! I'm the son of not just the Mayor of Carpinteria. But also, a Harvard graduated attorney-at-law. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts.

Bill Mackler is my favorite attorney in Santa Barbara.  He’s very knowledgeable, helpful, resourceful, and he will keep you focused on task.  I appreciate that he gets back to me quickly, provides excellent legal advice, and he’s really a great guy.  He often says he’s not charging me for a phone call, which is above and beyond what most attorneys do: charge you for every minute.  Give Bill a call.  He’ll be at his best to help you solve your legal problems.

Bill go out of his way to helpful and he is an extremely honest professional. He is absolutely the perfect person to consult with and cares more about his clients than money. He is generous with his time, extremely responsive and very informative!

Bill EXTRA - Ordinary, Personable, NEVER will try to cheat you, never will charge / bill  you unfairly. Has empathy, no snobby nose as high as a boeing 737 attitude. reviews.text:
I don’t even know where to start with my immensely positive experience and the feedback I have regarding Mr. Mackler and his services provided. A true blessing to the Santa Barbara Community. He is the most kind hearted lawyer, well spoken, intellectual, and truly the best not only in Santa Barbara but in general in his field/area of law that he practices.

His immense knowledge plus friendly attitude is something that is very rare and a lawyer like Mr. William Mackler is almost impossible to come by, not only that, his paralegal Maureen is an example to be followed as well by other paralegals at other practices. She is always thorough with her responses to your questions, she also goes the extra mile to make sure you are at ease both emotionally regarding your case and are updated as soon as she is in regards to any information that would be of help.

Please take my word, and don’t look elsewhere. Mr. Mackler is the lawyer that you want on your side. He knows what he’s doing, he will go the extra mile to make sure that he’s done everything to make sure that you are completely taken care of, and he works well beyond his call of duty. He gives you the peace of mind knowing that your money has not gone to waste and if anything has helped you save money in the end/any headaches and stress that could culminate as a result of your case, which, in my opinion, are PRICELESS positives of his service.

Keep in mind that when you’re looking for a lawyer, you’re looking for someone who knows what they’re doing and genuinely wants to do a great job. He’s not out for the money, he’s out for justice, and he‘s really someone I truly believe what’s to help others.

Don’t play yourself, give Mr. Macklers office a call, set up a consultation, and don’t even bother looking elsewhere. Thank me later, this is the best advice I could possibly offer anyone in a legal situation that they need resolved. There is so much to gain from hiring Mr. Mackler, and in some ways, you get a two for one deal, because his paralegal is truly the best Santa Barbara/ The state of California has to offer as well.

I’m not one to right reviews, ever, and I only do so if I’m either immensely displeased or extraordinarily impressed by services I have received.

I hope that my review helps someone that is facing a legal problem that they need resolved and does not know where to turn. Goood luck!

I was expected to pay exuberant costs for his office staff to send me a bills that I would always pay immediately.  Marcus said he would file paperwork that never got done and when I called him out on these issues and he said if I’m not happy I should leave.  I did leave Marcus and I’m much happier.   From my initial review of Marcus I suggested him to everyone giving him at least 3 clients.  I had to call each one up and tell them what happened to me and that I was sorry for recommending him.  All 3 are having the same issues and have either left Marcus or are leaving Marcus.  Also Marcus has another lawyer in the office that does not know anything.  I was told he has been a lawyer for a year and he takes way to long on items then you have to also pay Marcus to overlook his work.  You will end up paying $950 per hour.  Nobody is worth that much money.   Look at your invoice if he is your lawyer.  If you call Marcus about this he gets angry and stops working for you.   If I was to give Marcus advice it would be fire your entire staff and go back to the basics.  He knows his job but grew too big too quickly with a staff that is incapable. From the very first phone call that I had with Marcus, I knew that I would be in great hands. After interviewing a handful of attorneys in Santa Barbara to handle my divorce, no one else compared to the level attention and grace he and his team gave from the outset.

My case ended up being far more time consuming than anyone would have thought, and there were many times I was counting my blessings that I had Marcus and his team on my side. This process has been one of the most challenging situations that I’ve personally encountered, and the Morales team made it as easy as humanly possible under the circumstances.

The moment there was news to share, it was shared with me within minutes. Those going through a divorce know how much those minutes can matter, especially to bring one peace of mind and a restful night’s sleep. Marcus was always available whether it be over the phone, email, or a visit to his office. All communication was handled professionally, transparently, and when appropriate, lightheartedly.

The team's attention to detail, willingness to educate me along the way by referencing to cases and specific laws when making a point, and ability to advocate strongly for my case gave me confidence when navigating this uncharted legal territory. The team is made up of amazing listeners and I never had a moment where I felt my thoughts or questions went unheard or unanswered.

Marcus, Christina, and all of the others that have helped move my case along - I will be forever thankful!
