reviews.text: Mr Brown was attentive, explaining to me everything needed to know. I was so nervous and he helped me keep calm. He informed me of my rights as well for my future. He will be our #1 lawyer.  He truly cares about the citizens. I was so blessed to have him in my path. Many thanks Brown law office
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for choosing to work with us! It was our pleasure to assist you.

reviews.text: Working with Russel through my case was a great experience. Well nothing is ever great about dealing with legal matters, but Russel made the process as smooth as possible. He handled every matter with professionalism and individualized care. Can’t recommend him enough if you ever need to retain a lawyer. Appreciate the ease and promptness at how everything was handled. 10/10
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for choosing us Bakari. It was great helping you.

reviews.text: Best Attorney ever answered our calls at all times. Handle any & every question & concerns we ever had. Never showed up late to court. Would highly recommend.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Luis!

reviews.text: Very helpful, very knowledgeable and very friendly. Would recommend to everyone!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Slaven! We are glad we could help.

reviews.text: Russell was super helpful throughout my whole case! Always knew how to explain the process in a way I understood and I am very thankful for his help!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you! We enjoyed helping you!

reviews.text: Attorney Brown was very attentive, responsive and helpful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Lessly. We are always here if you need advice.

reviews.text: I highly recommend Ms. Christine Adams and her team! They are amazing!!! fast, excellent communicative, knowledgeable, empathetic, straight forward, kind, bothered to listen to my case and take me on, and WON! My ex employer was extra "special" and difficult, but Christine and her team was professional, fast and got the job done for me. She made the process easy for me, yet worked very hard in the background. I can't thank you enough, thank you so much!

I had an outstanding experience working with Adams Employment Law, particularly with Ms. Adams (Christine). From start to finish, they provided exactly the blend of proactive guidance and responsive support that I needed. They helped me ensure I had all my ducks in a row before leaving my job, which gave me a lot of peace of mind. Later, when a misunderstanding arose after my resignation, they were incredibly efficient and kind in helping me navigate it smoothly.

Overall, Adams Employment Law was both professional and supportive, and I’d recommend them to anyone looking for legal help during a job transition. They really do go the extra mile without making things complicated.

I contacted Adams law and spoke to Christine Adams  for advice and support. She was incredibly generous with her time and knowledge. She responded quickly, listened carefully, and provided clear, helpful information that truly made a difference in how I handled my situation. Her professionalism, kindness, and willingness to help stood out right away and made me feel supported during a stressful time. Although I haven’t needed to hire a lawyer due to how my situation has unfolded, she still went above and beyond without any obligation. I’m truly grateful for her help and would highly recommend her to anyone in need of a trustworthy and compassionate attorney.

Christine and her team are amazing! Truly trustworthy and will help you every step of the way. They will fight for your rights and make sure your voice is heard . Thank you again for all the help and care.

Christine Adams was wonderful to work with. She is reliable, pleasant, knowledgeable, thorough, and puts you at ease by explaining everything in detail. She kept me updated throughout the entire process and got better results than I ever would have imagined. I always felt as though she was looking out for my best interest. She and her team were professional, kind, courteous and responsive. Highly recommend!

Christine and her team are amazing. I was incredibly nervous and uncertain about what I should do regarding my situation. She gave me the strength and confidence to do what’s right by me and my family. I can’t thank her enough. She’s top class. Always responsive. Very smart. Empathetic. She fights for you and I would recommend her to anyone dealing with employment issues.

I had the pleasure of working with Christina and her team. I appreciate the step by step process. Communication was phenomenal. Very prompt. She was willing to work with me, also guided me in many ways throughout the process. And of course she’s a badass so I give her 5 stars!! Wouldn’t have chose anyone else if I could have.

This review is based solely on the lack of response to my form submitted regarding my employment situation. I cannot comment on Ms. Adams skills as an attorney.   Most, if not all law firms respond to either collect more information or to tell you they are unable to consider the case.  They make a point of telling you that doesn't mean your case doesn't have merit and they remind you that there is a timeline.  Ms. Adams didn't respond in any manner to the lengthy form I submitted.  Moreover, she appears to have taken information from my form to expand the questions she asks potential clients.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Schwartz:

Our intake form questions have not changed since 2010, and we have no record of ever receiving a form from you. Perhaps you have our firm mistaken for another? It happens. Please give my staff a call at (805) 845-9630 with any additional concerns. Thank you.

reviews.text:
Christine Adams represented me in a discrimination and retaliation case. She is brilliant, dedicated, aggressive and communicative/explanatory. She is direct and fair, and follows through. The claim she put together for me was a remarkable and deft synthesis of voluminous data, facts and details for a complex and unique case. Of all she offers as an excellent attorney, what I appreciated most was her genuine integrity, humanity and compassion. Christine was not only committed to representing me, but I believe she is committed to something one encounters less and less of in the modern world: doing what is right, and fair.

My discrimination issue was the most difficult employment experience of my life. Christine was a powerful reconciling support and force that enabled me to integrate, find closure, peace, and also reparations. She was exactly who, and what, I needed to get through this. In the end she facilitated much more than I had hoped for. I cannot recommend, praise or thank Christine enough for what she did for me. Please engage with her if you need someone with this rare combination of traits, values and abilities to fight for you.

The single most important decision is who is going to represent you when trouble surfaces!  I remain amazed, grateful and impressed with the degree of support I received from my very first interaction with Nicole, Ms. Adam's legal administrator.  She was extremely patient and actually stayed late on a holiday weekend to work on my initial client intake document which made it seamless and organized when Christine Adams went to bat on my behalf.
I cannot say enough about Adams Employment Law and the standard of their excellence in service which was evident from the start!
And, we won!!
Does not return calls or emails.

Ms Adams was kind as I was dealing with a tough separation from years at a company. She successfully helped reach a settlement agreement that felt like some justice was served. I highly recommend her!
I was happy with the outcome they provided for me. I appreciate the kindness, professionalism and service that christine offered!

My husband retained Ms Adams to represent his case. She was definitely the fiercest "bull dog" in the fight. She never backed down even though we faced a top notch attorney from Orange County. She won my case to my expectations. Very prompt response, efficient and definitely knows labor laws.

Excellent! Her response time was so quick to my rough inquiry. I was able to ask her the right questions, fill out the right forms, and set up a cost-free call to see if I should pursue action. She promptly and kindly told me everything I needed to know and showed me where I could affordably meet my needs. She has gained my trust completely. She is competent and has great support staff. I highly recommend reaching out to Christine with any and all employment law issues.

Christine Adams is highly knowledgeable, efficient, honest, and experienced. She is understanding of a difficult employment situation and made me feel heard and cared for. She did an excellent job for me. I highly recommend her.

I had the pleasure of working with Christine, she did a fantastic job on my case. She listened to all of my concerns and made me very comfortable during the entire process. I appreciate her kindness, professionalism and her sincerity to always do the right thing. Thank you Christine for being a committed, caring and dedicated professional!

I've had the pleasure of retaining and having Christine Adam's and Adams Employment Law represent me with an extremely positive solution and outcomes. I highly recommend her and her law firm. I found her professional and competent.

My experience with Ms. Adams and her staff has been beyond exceptional. Christine is sincere, professional and has a genuine passion for the law and fighting for what is right. She always took the time to explain things throughly and answer any questions I had, with honesty and compassion. I would highly recommend Christine Adams to anyone looking for a skilled and savvy attorney, that is also an all around good human being.
We were so glad that Ms. Adams was on our side. She is so knowledgeable and patient. I would recommend her as she can get you through the process. We were very happy with the results of our case.

I was fortunate to find this talented lady when I needed representation. She's a pitbull  with one hell of a great memory! She knows the law and most importantly...she is wonderfully empathetic to your situation. If you need help  I hope you use  her services,  you won't be sorry.
Horrible service. Left me hanging.
No help what so ever. You need money for help.
Couldnt put me in touch w an atty who handles elder abuse cases.
Such a great service. Best way to find legal help. Thank you!
The best & most trusted way to find a lawyer who has already been vetted. I would recommend the SBCBA Lawyer Referral Service to anyone!
Great way to find a qualified attorney. Great service!
Great public service!
A trusted and safe service for the public to reach out to when a legal matter or question arises.

Professional and responsive staff.  It's important to me as a consumer to use a bar-sponsored referral service, because these services do screen attorneys and are not just accepting anyone who can pay a subscription fee.  Most attorneys I have spoken with have always said "call the bar," so I do.
Very happy with my experience with the SB County Bar!

I highly recommend Tyrone Maho for the outstanding job he did handling my motor vehicle accident case. From the beginning, he and his staff were professional, knowledgeable, and always kept me informed throughout the process.

They worked diligently to make sure my case was handled properly and ultimately helped me reach a fair settlement. I truly appreciated their responsiveness and the care they showed toward my situation.

If you are looking for an attorney who is experienced, trustworthy, and committed to their clients, I would absolutely recommend them.

Maho & Prentice offered excellent support. They communicated great, were always prepared, and made sure every step of the process was clear. They genuinely care and are confident in their expertise. So grateful for their work and would gladly recommend them to anyone seeking dependable legal representation.

I was involved in a personal injury case that left me hurt, overwhelmed, and unsure of where to turn. By chance, an attorney who had previously been opposing counsel recommended Chad Prentice, telling me he was professional and easy to work with. From the very first phone call, I knew I was in the right hands.

I also had the opportunity to work closely with Attorney Veronica Sahagun, whose kindness, patience, and steady encouragement helped me work through some of the most difficult moments of this process.

This has truly been the best experience I’ve ever had working with an attorney, and I’m deeply grateful for the successful resolution they achieved on my behalf.

Maho Prentice represented me in a personal liability law suit. They achieved a very good result for me and their staff, particularly Veronica Sahagan, was particularly pleasant and courteous .
I can highly recommend their services.
Tyrone Maho and his team are results oriented, very experienced, and genuinely care about their clients. Highly recommended!

The law office of Maho Prentice will handle your case diligently as  they advocated for you. When it came to my representation their main focus was business is always in your your best interest!  There law practice illustrated a profound service from beginning to end. I highly recommend this law firm - call to get a top rated lawyer on your side! I did...Thank you Chad Prentice!!
It was my first time in working with an attorney after a car accident. Maho Prentice exceeded my expectations kind, professional, helpful and very informative through all the process.

It was an absolute pleasure working with Tyrone and his team.

From the outset, they took great care to understand the details of my case. Based on the questions they asked, it was clear to me that they are skilled at providing guidance to people going through a difficult time. I felt supported, and they thoroughly answered all of my questions through email and on the phone. They proactively communicated with me regarding the state of my case and informed me of my options without pressuring me towards any of them.

When we first received a settlement offer from the other party, it was lower than we had hoped. Jessica negotiated with the other party until we got an offer that I was very happy with. I don’t think it was possible to have gotten a better offer.

I cannot recommend them more highly. Thank you again, Tyrone, Jessica, and Samantha

I cannot express how grateful I am for the outstanding legal assistance I received from the entire team. After a devastating car accident, I felt overwhelmed and unsure of how to navigate the complex legal process. From the very first consultation, they made me feel supported, heard, and confident that they would fight for the best outcome.

Their professionalism, compassion, and dedication were evident every step of the way. They took the time to explain the details of my case, kept me updated regularly, and were always available to answer my questions. Their expertise in handling personal injury cases was truly remarkable, and they secured a settlement that exceeded my expectations.

I highly recommend their services! :)

I was very fortunate to secure legal representation with Tyrone Maho in 2013. Tyrone was patient, compassionate, and incredibly professional to work with. We were given excellent direction and guidance in how to approach a multi-party case. The case was ongoing across several years and during that time I struggled with challenges related to my partner in the case. We had a difficult break up and the case became overwhelming for me. Despite the challenges I faced, Tyrone remained professional and caring. Litigation is stressful and overwhelming— I really didn’t understand what was going on. Tyrone ensured I walked away with compensation and never gave me a hard time about my struggles. Thank you, Maho Prentice, for the grace, compassion and dedication you extended toward me during a difficult time.

I was in a bizarre not typical auto accident.  When other attorneys heard that I rear-ended the car in front of me, they didn't even bother to listen to the HUGE extenuating circumstances before telling me they would not take the case. Tyrone took it!

Tyrone listened to me, helped me with my medical, and understood that the first few days I was not thinking well because of my concussion.  He kept in touch and made my life easier and better.

After much hard work he got me a 6 digit settlement in spite of the fact that my own insurance said it was my fault. And my insurance rate didn't even go up.

If your case is a tiny typical case, do it yourself.  Attorneys take a large percentage.  However if your case it large or complex or one that needs a fighter on your side, this is the guy.  No amount of money is worth being in an accident, but if an accident happens to you, be sure and make Tyrone Maho your first call! Do yourself a favor and read some of the 60 other 5 star reviews, and ask yourself how good you have to be to have a 5 star rating over that many people.  Thank you Tyrone!

I cannot recommend Tyrone Maho enough! When I was rear ended and injured the last thing I wanted to think about was the legal details of it all. From my first meeting with Tyrone I knew he was the right fit to lead me through the process. Tyrone was accessible and responsive each and every time I reached out with questions or concerns.
If you find yourself needing a honest and reliable Attorney then Tyrone is your man, hands down.

We were in a terrible car accident, dealing with extensive medical recovery and issues.  We were referred to Tyrone Maho specifically, and he and the team were nothing short of outstanding.  Tyrone, Samantha and Andrea were compassionate and assured us that they would take care of everything.  And they did!  We couldn't imagine trying to navigate every aspect and detail of our situation.   They were timely with follow up.  Explained the process in simple terms.  The outcome and service provided to us was the best it could be from this terrible ordeal.  We highly, highly recommend Maho Prentice to anyone who may be in a similar situation.

I was so impressed by how Maho Prentice handled my personal injury claim. I was primarily Jessica Phillips' client and could not have been more pleased by her professionalism, availability, skill and support. Most of all, she got me the best settlement I could have received. I felt that I was in the her capable hands throughout the process. I admired her talent of combining tenacity  with practicality, common sense and courteousness in working with the insurance adjuster to arrive at an excellent solution for me.
I would recommend Jessica and the firm to anyone--and this is coming from someone who did practice law for many years--on the defense side, so my endorsement says a lot!
Tyron and his staff were terrific.  They were professional, responsive and exceptionally qualified to handle my case.  I appreciate all their efforts and would not hesitate to recommend them!

Tyrone, Jessica, and Samantha were amazing. From the beginning, Tyrone was so thoughtful and compassionate in our phone calls. He was thorough in his intake and in the advice he gave from the outset. His team was informative and they communicated consistently, always with care for my well-being. Tyrone has many years of experience, and he knew this case would be a tough one. There were circumstances I cannot disclose but suffice it to say it was a "long shot." Yet I knew in my heart that I deserved the compensation I received. And the team at Maho Prentice deserves the gratitude that I've shared with them and am sharing with you all. Finally, I live in LA. I would recommend Maho Prentice to any and all of my friends here -- I already have. Thank you, Tyrone and your team, for making me feel seen, heard, and for helping me build my life back with the compensation I deserve.

I was referred to Tyrone following a harrowing accident that left me badly injured and hungry for justice — but after everything I’d been through, the last thing I had the appetite for was a lengthy and emotionally draining legal process. But Tyrone assured me that it would be neither of those two things, and he was absolutely correct. From our initial consultation onward, I found him and his team to be warm, generous with their time, and completely transparent. He immediately put my concerns to rest and ensured that the settlement process was swift and painless for me. Tyrone not only helped me recover the settlement I deserved — he also helped me close the book on this dark chapter of my life and move forward with closure and dignity. He is a tremendous lawyer and a genuinely good person. While I do not recommend suffering traumatic injuries, I wholeheartedly recommend retaining this firm’s services if you ever find yourself in such a situation.

They are the BEST. Great about following up , getting back to me in a timely manner.  Every one in the office is great. I think they are the best personal injury attoney I have ever had. Thank you for doing a such a good job.

Chad & his team were great people.  We suffered a family tragedy and he was there for us every step of the way. It’s tough dealing with the loss of a loved one and the last thing you want to do is speak to strangers about it.  Chad was mindful, caring, and conveyed messages clearly.  He always made time for us whenever we had questions or concerns about the process.  I’m grateful for the services, advice, and exceptional results rendered.  You’ll be glad they’re on your team.

I was knocked off my scooter by a US mail truck.  Because I only had liability coverage my insurance company explained that they had no skin in this game.  The post office took a report but I could see that they would do nothing.  I was referred to Maho Prentice by my Trust atty.
Do not try to do this yourself, get represented.  Tyrone and his associates know what to do.  They are also a very friendly group to work with.

I was recommended to Tyrone and I can't be happier with the outcome. From the first meeting with him and his team through the completion of the settlement process I was informed and involved. I will definitely recommend Tyrone to my friends, family or anyone who needs help.

Without any experience in working with a personal injury attorney, and some mild trepidation, Tyrone and the team at Maho Prentice far exceeded expectations. They are extremely diligent, professional, and wonderful to work with. While the financial benefit/settlement from my claim was nice, it is actually the time and headache they saved that is invaluable. I highly recommend the team at Maho Prentice if you find yourself in need of a personal injury attorney in the Ventura/Santa Barbara County areas.

I highly recommend Maho Prentice Attorneys. Following a terrible auto accident where I was struck from behind by an intoxicated driver, I was fortunate to find Jessica, Tyron and the team at Maho Prentice. From the start, I was encouraged to focus on healing both physically and mentally from the trauma of the accident . There were regular communications to me regarding all aspects of my case, in addition to checking in on my well-being. This was my first legal case, and Jessica explained everything in detail, answered all of my questions, and ensured that I was comfortable with each new step as we moved forward. The final outcome of the case was a stressful period for me, however I felt completed supported and trusted that I was in the best legal hands possible. Having Jessica and the team at Maho Prentice Attorneys was truly the silver lining!

I was injured in an auto accident and Maho Prentice, LLP helped me to receive the maximum settlement possible.  Tyrone and Jessica instilled confidence in me from the very beginning.  They demonstrated impeccable professionalism and expertise  throughout the legal process.  Dealing with insurance companies can be intimidating at times.  It felt reassuring to know that I had Tyron and Jessica to advocate for me.  They frequently stepped in and used the law to my benefit when I felt bullied or taken advantage of by the other side.  I highly recommend Maho Prentice, LLP and will refer my friends and family to them in the future.

Maho Prentice, LLP helped me even though my situation was not a high stakes case. Without their help, I wouldn't have received the fair compensation that I did. I would definitely recommend their services to anyone needing assistance with a situation too stressful to figure out on their own. Everyone I encountered at this firm treated me with kindness and professionalism. So glad I contacted them!

I was hit by a car and a friend recommended Chad Prentice when it became clear I needed legal representation to deal with the insurance mess. He was absolutely great: clear, realistic, careful to explain the process and all the issues to consider as we moved forward. He and Samantha Baldwin worked together to resolve my case, and they got me a fair settlement after a lot of hard work. They are professional, caring, efficient and, most importantly, very effective! I would highly recommend these attorneys for any personal injury situation. You will be glad you did.

We are very grateful for Tyrone Maho and his office staff who fought for us and helped us through our car accident.  He was very attentive, answered all questions, and kept us informed.  His knowledge and experience really made this traumatic incident less stressful.  All in all it was a great experience working with them. Thank you!!

After I was involved in an auto accident I did not know what to do.  A friend recommended that I contact Maho & Prentice.  I am so pleased that I did.  They handled my personal injury law suit so quickly and very efficiently.  I could not be happier I would gladly recomend them.

Whether you are reading this today because of a Personal Injury or perhaps like our family, a Wrongful Death, you are at a cross roads in your life where you need to make very important decisions.  You may even be searching this site to help a friend or a family member who you know is hurting.  I want you to know that I felt the same way.

It was just over 3 years ago when we lost our father due to a mistake made by an errant driver.  At the time, we knew very little about the facts of the case but as the facts grew, I knew that we would need the help of someone who knew their way around such matters from a legal perspective, regardless of how smart I thought I was.  Based on the circumstances of the case, I also knew that it would not be easy and if we were to ever find a chance of a just settlement, it wasn’t going to come from any insurance company.

I then did what you are doing right now.  I went to the internet!  Now we all know that the internet is often our default source of information but we also know that it can in turn become sort of “Black Hole” in finding what we need.  This is especially true when the matter is more complicated than finding a vender who has what we are looking for and comes with a great return policy.

I did have the good fortune however of having a “cross reference” tool and a good network of friends/associates who knew the Law Firm of Maho/Prentice, LLP.  A friend/associate had a direct connection with Tyrone Maho so that was of great help.  Being a native in the same town where they practice, I then also cross referenced the firm with a retired attorney friend of mine who then gave me the okay.  The okay wasn’t for me to hire them but rather it was my process of vetting the firm.  Once I had what I needed, I made the decision to conduct my interview with the firm.  It would only make sense for you to do the same with any and all candidates of your choosing.

As you may have guessed, I did make the decision to hire the firm and it was a decision that I knew right away that I would never regret.  What folks need to understand is that often in these matters, you are going to be working very closely with the firm of your choice and it may be for well over a year and in our case more.  You need to be comfortable, honest and open in order to get the best out of the team you have selected but I digress.

Hiring and working with both Tryone, his staff, and Jessica Phillips who later came on board to become a key and integral factor during the management of our case, was a real blessing.  It has to be one of my better decisions as it relates to the dealings and affairs of our deceased father.  Tryone was even there to serve as support during the criminal court dealings related to the incident that caused our father’s death.  Who does that!!!

I know that in general, attorneys often get a bad rap and maybe more true for the Personal Injury attorney.  Throughout all my years I have heard and even said many attorney jokes, maybe you have too, but I must honestly say that what they did for me and our family was no joke!  They personalized our case and took ownership of all of our concerns from start to finish.  This firm should definitely be on your “must interview list”, for sure!

Armando Ramirez

Santa Barbara
helpful
Tyrone and his staff were empathetic partners in our legal battle. We couldn't have been happier with his work on our behalf!

Working with the staff at Maho Prentice LLP was a stress-free and enjoyable experience. Every member of the staff was friendly, courteous, and professional. I highly recommend their services and will use them again myself.

I had a wonderful experience working with Chad and Andrea.  Their professional and caring approach immediately put me at ease.  The team’s communication throughout the process was wonderful.  I would highly recommend them!

I can highly recommend Maho / Prentice attorneys at law. Chad Prentice has represented me twice now and done an excellent job each time. The first time in a personal injury settlement which resulted in me receiving the maximum benefit. The second time was an insurance matter where I was being sued in a subrogation case. Chad was able to get me removed as a defendant thus ending the insurance company’s claim against me. It’s a great lawyer that can work both sides of the street. And I can say with great confidence, not only are they good they’re also super nice. And as if that's not enough, They are fair with their fees too. If you have any need for a PI lawyer you won’t go wrong with Maho / Prentice and their excellent team.

The team at Maho Prentice has been great. I had to get surgery after a car accident and they checked in on me and my recovery periodically to make sure I was healing well which really emphasized how much they cared about returning me back to a healthy state. Wrapping up my case was nearly 100% virtual due to COVID and they were still very responsive, supportive, emphatic, and advisable on everything that went into getting this completed. In addition, they all communicated very well between each other with clear goals and tasks for each person to complete. If you're looking for a law office, definitely stop by Maho Prentice. Tyrone (partner), Jessica (associate attorney), and Samantha (legal assistant) are the best of the best in or around Santa Barbara.

I was fortunate to find the Maho/Prentice, LLP Attorneys at Law. Not having any experience with how to navigate the logistical side of a car accident. Their professional approach in guiding me through a time of uncertainty was comforting to say the least. Their team communicates very well, which allows decision making to be easy and straight forward. If you find yourself needing legal advice I strongly recommend calling them.
It's apparent this team works really hard to make their clients feel secure, and well cared for. I had a great experience working with Chad, Sam, Andrea and the rest of their team! :)
After my car accident  and insurance giving me the run around, I'm very glad I received Mr. Maho's information, very professional, straight forward and put my mind at ease.
Very professional, straightforward and supportive lawyer.

After being in a car accident my grandma could barely walk and lived in terrible pain due to her injuries. Chad Prentice helped make sure my grandma received all of the medical treatment she needed including a back surgery. After the surgery my grandma was able to walk and was pain free. I can’t recommend Maho & Prentice enough. Chad gave me my grandma back!!!! Thank you so much!
Tyrone completely put me at ease throughout the entire process. 100% recommend.

This time last week (7/30), I was sitting in the office of Maho Prentice with Samantha and Chad. The journey ended, I got paid!!! I'm so grateful
for their excellent, dogmatic, never give up actions on my behalf.
God Bless them and the firm always!!! Looking for a Law Firm? I highly recommend Maho & Prentice!!!
Professional very helpful

If you have the misfortune of needing a personal injury lawyer look no further, Chad Prentice and his amazing team will guide you through every step of the way with expert advice, kindness and compassion.

I was involved in a Bike Accident where the driver pulled out in front of me into the bike lane. I tried to work with the insurance company but when they informed me that they believed me to be 40% at fault I decided I needed a attorney to better represent my interest in this case. I contacted Tyrone Maho and from the beginning he was up front and confident that the end results would be the right results. Tyrone and Company took care of everything from the medical liens to dealing with the insurance company and their attorneys and filing all the legal forms. After 3 depositions, countless medical exams and hours of mediation the case was settled 14 moths later just a few months shy of our court date.
Tyrone is a part of the Santa Barbara legal community and this is a advantage when working a case locally as he know his way around the system and the right approach to take when preparing for a case for our courts. In the end Tyrone was able to negotiate a very good settlement that I would not have been able to do so without his representation. I would recommend you contact Maho & Prentice if you are in need of a personal injury attorney.

I have had a great experience with this law office. Ms. Baldwin is amazing and I am very grateful to her and her team for the outcome of my case. She answered all of my questions very promptly and made the situation as stress free as possible. I met Mr. Prentice who was also very nice. I am happy with my decision to choose them to represent me in this matter. I cannot thank them enough.

Chad, Sam, and the rest of the team were helpful, courteous and professional throughout my entire experience with them. They guided me through the whole process smoothly and explained everything in terms I could understand easily. Communication was always consistent and clear. I encourage anyone who may be looking for an attorney for the first time to reach out to Maho Prentice, they will take care of you and you'll feel comfortable knowing you're in good hands. Can't say enough good things about Chad and his team!

I am so grateful for the help afforded me by Maho & Prentice. I hired Tyrone  Maho to help me with a personal injury suit following a serious attack on my person. Tyrone was unwaveringly supportive and committed; I am not sure I would have seen my case through without his help.

Tyrone was by my and my family's side from the very beginning of the case, exploring absolutely every option with us and making sure we were well prepared for each new step and comfortable with every decision. The whole office at Maho & Prentice is hardworking and professional and communicated with us consistently. The final outcome of my case surpassed everyone's expectations, and I am so appreciative of the time, work, and patience that went into our 5-year fight.

Thank you so much!

Tristan Verburgt is the lawyer you should hire.  Unfortunately, I have experience with the law, and haven’t always been on the right side. reviews.text: Everything was done wrong from the beginning of dealing with Andrade law offices. It took 4 years from the accident I had to get a resolution in court and I ended up getting screwed in the end anyway. Terrible terrible experience
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for acknowledging that I fought your case for four years. Attorneys work for their clients; therefore, the clients make decisions throughout every phase of their case. This case went for four years because I had been fighting for four years trying to get the District Attorney to accept your expectations for settlement. Given the charges against you that resulted in a motor vehicle accident, your decision to accept a reckless driving resolution was not unreasonable. It is sometimes the case that when clients do not get their cases completely dismissed by the District Attorney, they lash out against the defense attorney who spent hours in court, hours in discussions with the District Attorney, hours writing motions, and position papers on their behalf, and in your case, preparing jury instructions should trial be necessary.
Trial is always an option for clients who opt not to take the best offer from the District Attorney. The decision is always up to the client. At Andrade Law Offices, we do our best to obtain the optimum result for our clients every time. I have been an attorney for more than 30 years, and I have an excellent track record for obtaining great results for my clients.
Below is a sampling of the excellent outcomes for some of our criminal clients:

-CHARGE: Felony Assault Charges with Gang Enhancement. ANDRADE LAW OFFICES RESULT FOR CLIENT: Judge Found Self-Defense; Case Dismissed.
- CHARGE: Attempted Murder, Assault with a Deadly Weapon. ANDRADE LAW OFFICES RESULT FOR CLIENT: Probation with no jail.
- CHARGE: Felony DUI with Injury. ANDRADE LAW OFFICES RESULT FOR CLIENT: Reduced to Misdemeanor – Misdemeanor probation.
- CHARGE:: Second Degree Murder. ANDRADE LAW OFFICES RESULT FOR CLIENT: Not Guilty Verdict After Trial.
- CHARGE: DUI Vehicular Manslaughter. ANDRADE LAW OFFICES RESULT FOR CLIENT: Settled in Trial .09% BAL: Settled in Trial.

- CHARGE: Felony Strike Assault Resulting in Great Bodily Injury. ANDRADE LAW OFFICES RESULT FOR CLIENT: Misdemeanor Probation.
---and thousands more excellent results for my criminal and DUI clients.
Here is a sampling of some of our excellent results for our Personal Injury Clients:
- $ 60.7M Verdict – Medical Malpractice
- $ 4.31M Jury Verdict - Slip and Fall.

reviews.text:
I had a bike accident. Another car turned into the bike lane and it was their fault. Also, my insurance did not cover anything, so I had to pay all the medical bills out of my pocket. So, I called Andrade Law firm to look into my case. At first, it was quite promising. Taylor said they would take the case, call the hospital to postpone the bills due date, etc. After I signed the contract, their attitude changed. They didn't respond my emails or phone calls. It took them a few months to get the police report. Honestly, I am not sure if they got the police report, because they didn't show me anything. Once, Taylor said SBPD is showing us the footage of the intersection. Then he said there is no footage available. Then he said SBPD is not providing the police report. And finally said the police report is inconclusive. Overall, before signing the contract they were quite responsive and promising, but after taking my case they were anything but professional and responsive. I had a really bad experience working with them.

Edit: your response is absolutely untrue and reflects exactly your unprofessional attitude. First, if you had done all this work, why didn't you tell me at the time, and why am I not aware of any of them?! Maybe because you are just making them up, just now?! I had to email you and call you several times to follow up on my case. Besides, I called you two days after the accident and signed the contract 9 days after. So, me not contacting a lawyer soon enough is absolutely not true and just a lame excuse. Second, not billing me for whatever you did (which was insignificant) was according to the contract. You didn't do me any favor!! Third, regarding witnesses, several bystanders called 911 and they dispatched an ambulance. But you told me there was no trace of any call on the 911 call logs. Which means you did not even bother to inquire the 911 call logs. Anyway, I wish I could hire a helpful and professional lawyer after, but you stalled me for too long that it was very late.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Karimi,
Your review is 100% untrue and inflammatory. I was the case manager on your case, and I can personally tell you that our office committed a lot of time, money and resources on a case that in the end could not be proven. You, like all our clients are in complete control of the decisions to obtain recovery from all resources available to them. You made your decision, and we honored it. For reasons explained to you in detail, we had no choice but to recommend that you seek counsel elsewhere. If you would like a copy of your file to see all of the work we put into representing you, please contact our office at 805-962-4944.
Thank you for the 5 star review. We appreciate it very much!
Thank you Ahmad. We sincerely appreciate the review. It has been a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text:
Steven Andrade is THEE Top Defense Criminal Attorney in my book and you should absolutely look no further!!  I had a criminal case with Mr. Andrade in which I was overcharged by the District Attorneys office.  The charge could have resulted in having to serve jail time, but because of Mr. Andrade's professionalism and masterfulness in the court room, experience and strategic execution, my charge was reduced and I served no jail time.

From the moment I met with Mr. Andrade immediately following my arrest, I knew I had chosen THEE best attorney!  I had never felt so confident in my life that he would ensure that justice and the truth would prevail.  I was amazed by his experience, intelligence and confidence in the court room, he exudes professionalism and is on top of his game at all times for sure!!  There were no other attorney’s or DA’s in the court room that could even touch his charisma and experience.  Not only is he currently a personal injury litigation and criminal defense attorney, he was a prosecutor for more than 10 years.  In addition, he was a Deputy District Attorney for 5 years and an Assistant Attorney General until 1988.  So needless to say, he has represented clients on both sides over the years and there is no one else on the planet you would want representing you, than someone who knows how to successfully navigate both sides of the fence.

The DA was not giving in, and if it wasn’t for Mr. Andrade representing me, I surely would not have had the confidence that I did.  They were not going to reduce the charges, so Mr. Andrade said to the judge, than this is going to trial.  The DA knew that he didn’t have a chance against Mr. Andrade, so after persistent, influential conversations between the DA and Mr. Andrade, my case was reduced and there was no jail time.

His office was in constant contact with me throughout the entire process and always kept me abreast of what was going on and what the next steps would be and what I could expect.  They went ABOVE AND BEYOND what I expected, especially from an attorney’s office as I know how busy they are.  Mr. Andrade was always available personally as well if I needed to speak with him and would return my calls the same day no matter what.

In addition, I am in the process of getting my real estate license and the BRE is very strict if there are any negative criminal marks on your record whatsoever.  I hired an attorney up in San Francisco where I live now, to help me with the legal aspect of all of this.  I asked Mr. Andrade if he would mind writing a letter describing my incident from his perspective as my legal counsel.  Without hesitation, he said yes and took time out of his extremely busy schedule to write me a very professional letter that will have a huge positive impact on me getting my license.  I don’t know any attorney who would do that for someone 3 years after their case is closed and not ask for payment either.  Truly an amazing, giving, intelligent and compassionate man.

I just cannot say enough positive and amazing things about Mr. Andrade, his wife Kathleen and their entire team.  He is very personable, always there for his clients and will go above and beyond for you from day 1 until the end!

Thanks again for everything your team did for me!!!  I will be forever grateful :)
~ Tara
reviews.ownerResponse: I am genuinely humbled by this review. Thank you Tara and best of luck to you.

reviews.text: I am a courier who delivers packages for an international delivery service. I have retained NorstrandBlack TWICE since 2015. In 2015 I was attacked by a Pitbull while delivering a package and was severely mauled and injured with puncture wounds and cuts in the ankle, inner thigh, and groin area. Additionally, due to these injuries I was unable to perform my duties as a courier for over a month. I contacted Renee Norstrand and for more than a year Renee, Douglas, and Anne worked diligently to obtain a settlement all while keeping me informed on the case. Because of their hard work and patience in negotiating with the homeowner’s insurance I finally received a VERY GENEROUS SETTLEMENT for my injuries from the Pitbull attack. Not only that, NordstrandBlack made sure the homeowner’s insurance would no longer insure the homeowner unless the Pitbull was no longer on the premises. Then, in 2020, again, while delivering a package, I was “rear ended” while I was at a full stop (not my fault). The driver who hit me did not brake at all and my delivery van was “totaled.” Due to the accident, I received back and knee injuries. Then, I knew EXACTLY who to call. Renee, Douglas, and their team jumped back into action and in nine months I received another generous settlement. “BOTTOM LINE,” Renee, Douglas, and Anne are the professional team you want to represent you when you need help. They have always been there when I needed them, just recently I called Renee and she referred me to an attorney who specializes in property owner and tenant issues and I called that attorney and my issues were immediately resolved.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to write a positive review of our legal services. We greatly appreciate your kind words and continued support as a client. It was a pleasure representing you. We strive to provide personalized and effective solutions that meet our clients needs. It's always rewarding to know that our efforts have made a positive impact on our clients' lives.
Take good care!

Then you try to reach out for legal counsel, and believe me, there are alot of great attorneys in the world. There are those who go the distance, and then there are those who don't. Then there is Renee.
When you need someone to believe in you, and make that connection, she will. Renee is the kind of person who is passionate about her cases and the way outcomes will affect your life.
Renee also has a track record that speaks for itself. Before I ever spoke with her myself, I asked around. Everything came back positive and then I decided to call. I bought a new expensive home.  After a few months the stone floor, and inside and exterior walls all cracked around the same area in the  kitchen.  I called the builder and they repaired all the areas.  Within a few months the same problem recurred.  This time the stone floor was replaced with a wood floor of my choice.   It was very long before their was more cracking.  I wanted the builder to find out the cause of the problem but they refused.  At that point, I decided I would need to hire an attorney.  I was referred to The Law Offices of Renee Nordstrand.  Ms. Nordstrand wrote letters and spoke to the builders representative.  The builder hired geologists and construction experts and it was determined that the structure was defective in the kitchen area where the cracking was occurring.  We moved out of the home for four months while the defect was repaired and we received an additional 10 year home warrantee.  I was so pleased that it was all done, to our satisfaction, without the need for  litigation.

Thank you again for all your hard work. Renee was amazing and very easy to work with.  She takes the time to make sure I understood everything and she knows how to fight for you and deal with all the big insurance companies. Highly recommended!!!

He’s extremely smart, knowledgeable, honest and professional. reviews.text: Mr. Stephen Penner and Mr. Jeremy Purves recently handled a construction defect matter arising from the lack of appropriate waterproofing on my house.  The contractor had gone out of business, and had transferred the assets of it's corporation to a different corporation to avoid liability to creditors like me whose homes they had improperly constructed.  That action made the case extremely difficult, and, as a practicing attorney myself, I thought that my chances of recovery were slim to none.  Mr. Penner and Mr. Purves worked with impressive skill, diligence and persistence in the face of just about every legal obstacle that the insurance defense counsel could mount.  At the end, we mediated a very favorable settlement.  Without their help, there is no question that I would have received zero reimbursement for my extensive repairs to the negligent construction.  They are both top notch professionals.

reviews.text:
Attorney Stephen Penner recently represented me in a divorce case which is now resolved.   A friend referred him to me because of his 40+ years of law experience.   His performance in my case was outstanding and I would recommend him to anyone looking for a competent, capable and great attorney!

Now that my case is over, in hindsight I would say a couple of greatest client benefits of working with Mr. Penner are his many years of practicing law in Santa Barbara (in different capacities) have resulted in him:

1.  Creating great and meaningful relationships with many of Santa Barbara's law professionals (across the board in many different places).
2.  Having a deep understanding of Santa Barbara's legal system and its unique politics.

This inside knowledge is a VERY strategic advantage for any client to have.  (It's like having a treasure map in hand!)   In my case, he worked well with the opposing counsel and saved me additional legal fees by getting us to mediation quickly and avoiding a lengthy and costly trial.

Divorce is such a difficult time in anyone's life, as it was for me.  It gave me peace of mind knowing that Mr. Penner was there by my side fighting for my best interest and in fairness during such an emotional time.  He kept it to the facts, followed the law, and got to the prize!

In my personal experience, he has the expertise, confidence, competence and connections to successfully represent any client.   It is my pleasure to recommend Mr. Penner to others seeking similar counsel.

reviews.text: Went to Stephen Penner for some simple estate planning...I do not recommend at all - he was rude, a poor communicator, and attempted to do a bait-and-switch on his pricing. When we arrived for our appointment he ignored us for almost an hour, then finally took down all our information that I had already given him over the phone, and at the end proceeded to tell us that he wanted to charge us many times over the previously negotiated rate for the service. This was for a simple will! I referred him to the previously negotiated rate - then he totally dropped us like a hot potato - no calls returned, no follow up with us, no apology for misunderstanding, nothing. Wasted hours of my time. Some research I should have done PRIOR to meeting with him also shows that he's had his license to practice law suspended more than once - not trustworthy.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Johansen,

We only met on 7/23/2016 for a free half hour consultation that was very cordial and educational, and you left our office without voicing any complaints or concerns. Thereafter, we were informed that LegalAccessPlans.com had, without our consent, incorrectly informed you that we charged $170 for an entire husband and wife estate plan. We would have worked with you had you called our office to clarify this misunderstanding. Instead, you chose to post an inaccurate and unfair review on multiple websites despite the facts that you were never a client of our office and that we have an established and proven track record with a long standing clientele who have expressed satisfaction and gratitude after our assisting them with family law, estate planning and probate matters. In an attempt to resolve your negative experience, Steve took the time to call you and offer to do your estate plan free of charge to make up for any misunderstanding caused by LegalAccessPlans.com, which offer you declined. We understand that legal issues are stressful, and we sincerely hope that you find someone outside of LegalAccessPlans.com (with whom we have never been affiliated) to complete your estate plan portfolio.

Cordially,
The Law Offices of Stephen E. Penner

reviews.text:
I couldn't be more grateful for the outstanding representation I received from this exceptional law firm specializing in ADA cases. As someone living with a disability, facing discrimination and accessibility barriers felt overwhelming and isolating—until I reached out to them.

From the very first consultation, their team was incredibly compassionate, attentive, and professional. They took the time to truly listen to my story, explain my rights under the Americans with Disabilities Act in clear terms, and outline a strong strategy tailored to my situation. Their expertise in ADA law is unmatched; they navigated complex legal challenges with precision and determination, always keeping me informed every step of the way.

Thanks to their tireless advocacy, we achieved a successful outcome that not only held the responsible parties accountable but also brought real changes to improve accessibility for others in similar situations. They fought passionately for justice, turning what could have been a daunting process into an empowering experience.

If you're dealing with ADA violations or disability discrimination, I wholeheartedly recommend this firm. They're not just lawyers—they're true champions for equality and inclusion. Five stars aren't enough! Thank you for giving me my voice back and making a genuine difference in my life.
I’ve been using this service for about seven years now, and the staff are extremely incredible and helpful.
I love the fact that they care about people, and they care about accessibility. Also, they are very easy to work with.
More then just your attorney I made a friend

I had the absolute pleasure of working with this firm, I am extremely grateful for the excellent legal service that was provided to me. The firm was very professional and communicative, making a difficult time in my life so much easier. They were thorough, diligent, and professional at all times, handling my case with utmost care. Everything was handled in a timely manner. They were patient with me, and involved me in every step. The attorney's knowledge is truly extensive and their presence truly set them apart. They are an outstanding team of attorneys and are exceptional advocates. Words cannot express how I feel about their performance – I want to give a special big thank you to Benjamin Sweet! He is amazing, professional, thoughtful, and treated me very well during some challenging times. I would 100 percent recommend them to my friends and family and to those reading this review. They were extremely helpful and will never be forgotten for the amazing work they completed on my behalf! Thank you Nye, Stirling, Hale Miller & Sweet, LLP!
They are so great to work with!

I had the pleasure of working with Jonathan Miller to navigate the complexities of a corporation’s severance package, and I cannot recommend him highly enough. From the outset, Jonathan demonstrated an impressive depth of knowledge and a clear, strategic approach to my situation. Jonathan provided thoughtful, actionable advice every step of the way.

What stood out most was his ability to simplify the intricacies of corporate law, making it easier for me to understand my options and the potential outcomes of each decision. This was incredibly important, as the issues we were tackling were multifaceted and high-stakes. Not only did he possess an exceptional grasp of the law, but his practical approach helped me avoid pitfalls and make informed choices that were aligned with my long-term goals.

Jonathan was also extremely responsive and proactive. He took the time to address my concerns, provide updates, and offer insights into how best to proceed. His communication was clear, concise, and delivered in a timely manner, which made a stressful process much more manageable.

If you're looking for a skilled lawyer who combines legal acumen with a genuine commitment to their clients' success, I would wholeheartedly recommend Jonathan Miller.

In my dealings with this law firm, I have found their support staff to be empathetic, their understanding of the situation to be accurate, their communication to be prompt and direct, and their means of gaining a quick and satisfactory settlement to be effective. I would recommend this law firm to others who find themselves in a similar position to my own.
This is a great law firm. They are truly helpful with people with disabilities, they have great customer service as well as an overall welcoming atmosphere was speaking to them.

reviews.text: With my daughter going away to college, a friend gave me the advice to get a durable power of attorney, authorization to release medical information, and advance health care directive so that if my daughter needed my help - hospitals, banks, etc. would be able to talk with me! It didn't even occur to me that I would not have this ability when I still pay her insurance and I am paying for her college tuition... but I didn't. Montecito Law Group made this complicated thing easy and fast! They were amazing. I can't recommend them more strongly.

reviews.text:
100% recommended. Kingston helped me with my husband's process. Thanks to them, I had a very smooth experience. They were always helpful and answered all my questions.
Carmen and Natasha played a fundamental role; they guided me and always resolved my doubts. Abbe Kingston helped me reunite my family. I am eternally grateful to him and his team.

They were incredibly helpful in our very long process. They were so transparent from the get go, which was a big relief from our family because we were scammed before. I recommend this firm of lawyers.

My journey has begun. After 36 years living in the USA, I think I see a light at the end of the tunnel, I hope it's not an incoming train.

If you are serious about your future, and value yourself, this is a place to consider.  Expedited and professional attention.

UPDATE
Few days ago my green card application was granted. I will be in gratitude with the Firm the rest of my life.

My case was complex, USCIS had problems understanding some vital points of my situation. Nevertheless The Firm was able to navigate issues, present facts and allow USCIS to make the right decision.

Mr. Kingston, Ms. Anaya, Carmen and the rest of the Firm, thanks so much for this successful outcome.

Outstanding Immigration Legal Support

Kingston, Martinez & Hogan LLP provided exceptional service in handling my complex immigration matter with the highest level of professionalism and care. The entire team was highly responsive, proactive, and consistently one step ahead—anticipating immigration notices and clearly guiding me on what to expect and how to prepare.

Tanya Ahlman was thorough, knowledgeable, and extremely responsive throughout the entire green card process. Her guidance was instrumental in achieving a successful outcome, from my I-485J filing and EAD extension to the completion of my full green card application. She answered all my questions promptly and comprehensively, demonstrated strong attention to detail, and genuinely cared about resolving potential issues to ensure a smooth process.

Alex also provided excellent support during my H-1B transfer, and every team member I interacted with was professional, clear, and helpful.

My wife and I are especially grateful to Ms. Tanya Ahlman—her dedication, deep expertise, and genuine care are truly appreciated.

I highly recommend Kingston, Martinez & Hogan LLP to anyone seeking experienced, reliable, and compassionate immigration legal support.

The experience and capability of attorney Abbe Kingston speak for themselves. Abbe guided us with professionalism, dedication, and honesty throughout the process, successfully handling our residency for the United States while we were still living in our country of origin. We appreciated the information, monitoring, and the option to communicate in Spanish, so we thank everyone who makes up this prestigious firm. Carmela and Natasha played a key role; their patience and knowledge were excellent. What we thought would be a very stressful procedure was actually very manageable thanks to Abbe and her staff. We recommend Abbe Kingston with absolute conviction that He is the best immigration lawyer in the United States.
Gaby was very kind and friendly during the call.

We had a great experience working with Mr. Kingston, his team, and Carmela. They were all professional, kind, and very supportive throughout the whole process. We’re truly thankful for their help and would happily recommend them.

Kingston Martinez & Hogan LLP handled a complex immigration matter with professionalism and care. Tanya was thorough, knowledgeable, and responsive throughout the entire process. Her guidance was instrumental in reaching a successful outcome. I highly recommend this firm to anyone seeking experienced and reliable immigration support!

Truly grateful for the professionalism, care, and support shown by Mr. Kingston, his team, and Carmela throughout our entire process. They were all attentive, respectful, and made us feel at ease every step of the way. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience and are thankful for how smoothly everything was handled.   We definitely recommend them!

Mr. Kingston and his attorneys provide competent, compassionate representation. I have been a client of this firm for over 2 decades. Despite some very challenging obstacles, Mr. Kingston was able to prevail in my Permanent Residency application, and successfully overcame some mitigating factors. Later this firm assisted me with my Naturalization application, and was once again able to prevail in spite of some very real ineligibility issues. They provided expert advice and guidance throughout the process, and in particular Ms. Anaya, an attorney in the firm, was very supportive and effective when attending my actual interviews.
I could not be more grateful for the intelligent, strategic manner by which they addressed my applications and would highly recommend this firm for any immigration needs, no matter how daunting the prospect seems. I am now naturalized citizen, and owe this firm a great debt of gratitude.
Attorney Kingston, a person who deserves all my respect for his honesty, loyalty, and professionalism, is 100% recommended for immigration cases.

I highly recommend Attorney Tanya Ahlman, Attorney Alexander Neder for Visa and Green Card application services. I believe they are the best immigration lawyers in America. Alex helped me on my TN, H1B processing, Tanya supports me finished my complex full green card application processing, including a job change during i485 filing. They both are great professional, very responsible, always answer my questions very fast and completely. Most important, they really care their clients very much, help solve potential issues, remove blocks, make each step more smoothly. And the full team I contact are so nice, very clear, and helpful also.
My family especially great thanks MS Tanya Ahlman, her great care, deep professional changed our life. We can’t express our words about thanks. We sincerely 10/10 recommend her and the Kingston, Martinez & Hogan LLP firm to the people who need an   immigration service.

Excellent service! I am very thankful to everyone on the team for the help and guidance through the green card application process. Very responsive, always one step ahead of immigration notices, informing me about what is coming and what I should do. Carmela is on top of things and it was a pleasure working with her and Abbe.

I have been working with Kingston, Martinez and Hogan for over 25 years. From the application of my Greencard to becoming a US citizen I entrusted Mr. Kingston and his team with my immigration matters. After being a permanent resident for 20 years I reached out to Mr. Kingston in June os 2024 to guide me through the process of becoming a US citizen. Mr. Kingston and his assistant Liana Flores-Pulido were extremely helpful and within two months time I had my interview at USCIS and was sworn in as a US citizen. The entire process went very smooth and they provided me with an attorney by my side during the interview. I can highly recommend the legal services of Kingston, Martinez & Hogan to anybody needing legal support with immigration matters.

As an immigrant , my journey to the USA began seven years ago with a dream to live in America and fulfill my potential as an entrepreneur. Navigating the complexities of immigration was daunting, especially since I wasn't just a typical immigrant but one looking to establish a legal business in America. Fortunately, finding Kingston, Martinez, and Hogan Attorney office was a turning point in my life.

From day one, Attorney Tanya Ahlman and Abbe Kingston provided unparalleled guidance. They helped me understand my unique situation and the different paths available for immigration. Their professionalism and clarity about the legal path and requirements set a high standard. They meticulously explained every detail, ensuring I was always informed and confident about the next steps.

The team's dedication to excellence was evident in their approach. They handled every aspect of my case with precision and adherence to timelines, making the entire process seamless and efficient. What stood out was their commitment to enhancing my experience, consistently making me feel comfortable and supported by true experts.

Thanks to their unwavering support, I am now  on the path to complete the US Citizen Journey. This milestone would not have been possible without the exceptional services of Kingston, Martinez, and Hogan. Their expertise and personalized care transformed a challenging journey into a smooth and successful one.

If you reside in Santa Barbara or anywhere in California and are seeking immigration legal services, I wholeheartedly recommend Kingston, Martinez, and Hogan. Their knowledge, efficiency, and genuine care for their clients' success are unmatched. Trust in their professionalism, and you will be guided every step of the way with compassion and expertise.

Hello! I'm María Zurita. I'm very grateful to the Kingston and Martínez law team, especially to Gisela Maya, Liana, and attorney Andrea Anaya, who worked on my husband's residency case. I highly recommend them; their service is excellent and very thorough. They are very kind and were always there to answer my questions. I'm truly grateful to the Kingston and Martínez team.

I’m very satisfied with the service of KMH. My employer initiated the perm based EB2. It took a long time due to backlog in USCIS. But lawyers from KMH were very fast in their parts. I want to specifically thank Tanya for very fast processing of every steps. Also want to thank David for writing the draft letters (though we didn’t had to submit O1 application). I’d certainly recommend them.

I had the pleasure of working with Tanya Ahlman and team at KMH for my Green Card application through my employer. The level of details, transparency and professionalism were fantastic. Every single question/concern was very clearly and patiently answered making the overall process very smooth and seamless. I would highly recommend the KMH team for immigration services !
Learned more in 5 minutes of speaking with Mr. Abbe A. Kingston than in hours of speaking with other lawyers. Class act.

I had a pleasure of working with Attorney Tanya Ahlman (& Team) at Kington, Martinez & Hogan. Tanya guided me for EB-1 Green card filing (approval) and adjustment of status. Tanya was very well organized, professional, quick to respond and exceptional. The firm properly maintains all the documents and provide great advise related to immigration matters.

I am happy to recommend Attorney Tanya Ahlman and Kingston, Martinez & Hogan LLP.

I highly recommend Tanya Ahlman and her law firm for Green Card application services. As I go through the process of applying for a Green Card, Tanya has been instrumental in guiding me smoothly. With the I-140 approval notice already secured, we are now moving forward with the adjustment of status application. Tanya's professionalism and expertise have been exceptional, ensuring that everything is done efficiently. I am impressed with her attention to detail and responsiveness. Despite the expected long wait, I have full confidence in Tanya's abilities and eagerly anticipate the next steps.

I am extremely grateful for the invaluable assistance provided by the lawyer, Mr. Abbe Kingston, and his paralegal, Ms. Carmela Saragoza. They were always ready to help me and promptly answered all my questions regarding my immigration process. I cannot thank them enough for their support. Words cannot express my gratitude for their help, which has changed my life. They are truly the best in their field. I hope that others can recognize their dedication and professionalism as well. I wholeheartedly recommend the Kingston, Martinez, and Hogan LLP firm for any immigration-related matters. I deeply appreciate everything they have done for me.

It is with great pleasure to write the following on behalf of the law firm of Felix and Killen.  Upon meeting Daniella Felix, it was quite evident that I was meeting an attorney who was willing to hear my story of the auto accident in which I was injured.   Though I had never experienced such a moment, Daniella listened with great concern as to what had occurred.  In explaining to Daniella what had happened, I noticed that she was very compassionate and wanted to be sure that I was receiving care for my injury.

Once it was decided that Daniella and her partner, Bryce Kellen would take my case, my wife and I felt assured that we would be in good hands with their firm.  Daniella took the lead of our case and proceeded to ask of details and proceed with her investigation.  She once again wanted to be sure that I was receiving proper care above all. She contacted the other party’s Insurance Company and took care of all the necessary details so that I may focus on my medical care.  She also contacted my Medical  Provider so they would know who should be billed for the expenses incurred.

All in all, I could not have found a better Law Firm than Felix and Kellen.  Daniella worked tirelessly to handle all our legal issues, during this traumatic time for my wife and I.   She was very professional and above all was extremely compassionate in assisting us during this period.  We are very happy how things have turned out and Thank You very, very much Daniella Felix.  We hope to see you again under more pleasurable circumstances!

I was advised of their team approach to my case in that they would "put their heads together" to make sure I received the best counsel. I thought it over for a few days and made my decision to hire them - although, I knew that day they were the right firm. Felony charge has been reduced to misdemeanor. None can compare to Law Offices of David Chesley!

I recently had the privilege of witnessing the remarkable legal expertise of Sanford Horowitz as he defended a family member in a challenging legal case. From the outset, Mr. Horowitz exhibited an unparalleled level of professionalism, dedication, and humility that left a lasting impression.

Mr. Horowitz's meticulous attention to detail was evident in every aspect of the case. He left no stone unturned, meticulously examining all the evidence and legal precedents to craft a robust defense strategy. His thorough approach instilled confidence and reassurance during what was undoubtedly a stressful and uncertain time for our family.

One of the most impressive aspects of Mr. Horowitz's representation was his ability to negotiate effectively on behalf of his client. Through his expertise and negotiation skills, he was able to secure a favorable outcome, significantly reducing the fines and penalties originally faced by our family member. His determination and commitment to achieving the best possible result were truly commendable.

What sets Mr. Horowitz apart, however, is not just his legal acumen, but also his humility and genuine care for his clients. Despite his extensive experience and accomplishments, he remains approachable, down-to-earth, and empathetic. He took the time to listen to our concerns, patiently explaining legal complexities in a way that was easy to understand, and always making us feel valued and respected.

In conclusion, I highly recommend Sanford Horowitz for anyone in need of exceptional legal representation. His exemplary professionalism, attention to detail, and genuine concern for his clients set him apart as a truly outstanding defense attorney. If you find yourself in a legal predicament, having Mr. Horowitz in your corner will undoubtedly give you the best chance for a favorable outcome.

reviews.text:
Accepting that I was disabled & unable to work anymore was daunting, humbling & scary. When starting research on the process, available information was vague at best while I soon discovered that some of the law firms specializing in disability claims didn’t have their clients’ best interests at the forefront. Solely by chance, my wife came across Ghitterman, Ghitterman & Feld…..absolutely none of my aforementioned concerns applied to them. In my opinion, Ghitterman, Ghitterman & Feld are the class of their profession.

They do exactly what they say will from Day 1 - no vagueness at all. My Hearing Representative Anhel Farias was wonderful - spent significant time with me preparing for the hearing & was a calm, steady presence throughout the entire process.

However, as anyone who has run a business knows well, the people behind the scene(s) can be the most valuable. My assigned Social Security Analyst, Nancy Montoya personifies this more than anyone. For over 3 years, Nancy has been the constant professional, knowledgeable, courteous and always respectful. She answered every call, email & question I had…..for over 3 years! Let that resonate - Ghitterman, Ghitterman & Feld hadn’t received a dime from me (they only charged a flat fee if & when I was approved) - & Nancy was always there for me. I was denied twice & became increasingly frustrated; it didn’t deter Nancy. She clearly the best at what she does. I am so grateful to have gone thru this ridiculously long process with her on my side….again she’s the best.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to review our firm, our team is always relentless in doing what we can to help!
