reviews.text: Crane, Flores is one of the most professional firms I have ever dealt with. Mark Flores is extremely dilligent and very knowledgeable about the legal system. My case was very complicated and with Mr. Flores’ guidance and all of the time he put in on my case, it yielded a very acceptable outcome on my behalf. I would highly recommend this firm for any legal assistance you may need- Without reservation.
Great attorneys and very trustworthy!

In 2014 I was hit by a car while commuting on my bicycle to work. The collision, for which the driver ultimately accepted liability, resulted in a serious back injury that left me disabled for over a year. I turned to Mark Flores for guidance and quickly realized he was there to help. Out of work and in pain, I relied on Mark to advocate for my best interests and to manage all of the legal matters in my case. This made it possible for me to focus on preparing for surgery and getting well. Over the course of the year, Mark was able to help me in suggesting helpful alternatives to help pay for mandatory expenses such as; co-pays and medical bills and living expenses as I was unable to provide them myself while out of work.

Throughout my case, Mark and his staff have bent over backwards to accommodate my special needs in a very timely manner.  From day one he has guided me step-by-step, helping me identify appropriate medical expertise and helping to communicate with physicians throughout it all.

Although Mark is a busy man, he always found the time to answer all my questions and provided clarification when needed. I was completely out of my depth in the legal arena but Mark never made me feel naive. He always treated me with the utmost professionalism and respect.

I deeply appreciate all he has done for me, and I can recommend him without hesitation to anyone who needs legal guidance.

I wholeheartedly recommend Mark Flores for anyone in need of a personal injury attourney. Mark is competent, professional and (surprisingingly these days) seems to genuinely care about getting his clients a good settlement.
I was seriously injured by a negligent driver as a pedestrian through no fault of my own, I experienced a long and painful recovery process and a complex and extended settlement process, Mark did everything he could to make these processes easier. He was also very conscientious about returning calls/emails in a timely fashion.

I normally don’t take the time to write reviews, but I was very inclined to do this for Mark Flores. My mom and I got in a car accident with two cars that was not the fault of us. My mother was injured in the accident and had to go to the hospital and my car was totaled. I knew I had to get a personal injury lawyer, yet I never had to find one before. I took my chances searching the web and found Mark Flores. I looked at his reviews and decided I would work with him. That was the best decision I made. My friends told me to watch out for lawyers because they are out for themselves and they will take as much as they can get from you. Let me tell you Mark is NOT this kind of lawyer. He is amazing and helped us get through a difficult time and we were completely compensated for our situation. He is defiantly the best personal injury lawyer you can get and you can feel you are in good hands with his firm. I would recommend him to anyone.

After I was in a motorcycle accident i called Mark Flores. He was always easy to get ahold of and attentive to my concerns. He fought hard, took care of everything and got me a settlement im very happy with.

My life turned upside down after my accident 2 years ago. Boy am I happy I hired Mr. Flores or else I wouldnt have known what to do and what direction to head. He's professional and his legal advice is what made all the difference

Mark was very helpful with my car accident incident. If anyone runs into an accident, Mark is the guy to see! He is very passionate about his work and if I ever have any problems in the future I will definitely hire him again. Thank you Mark.

They made life so much easier for me when after i got into a accident. My Lawyer helped me get through with my medical process, it was a very stressful time for me and they were there every step of the way. They answered all my questions and let me tell you I had a lot of questions and were patient with me at all times. They are devoted to their clients every step if the way. When you feel like there is not light at the end of the tunnel especially when you have been in an accident and then you find a great lawyer to help you through it really makes a difference and they did just that!!! Thank you 100 times over for all your hard work to help me get thru a tough time in my life with this accident and all my medical needs.

His substantial experience and attention to details was invaluable. Way to go, Mark! I would recommend him to anyone having suffered a personal injury.
Sincerely, Jim Carter
